body:
I need you to stand with me against these heinous attacks. |

Fellow American,

I'll just say it: MSNBC has a racism problem in their ranks.

Back in April, they ran an article by a man who had these fine things to say about me:

| _**"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."

"I make a hard distinction between black conservatives and these tokens (HERSCHEL WALKER AND TIM SCOTT), who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_
---

They're coming after me again, and this time one of their writers is accusing me of being... anti-Black. **Yep, you read that right.**

The author writes, _**"GOP Senate candidate Herschel Walker's entire political career is rooted in anti-Blackness."**_

This is so absurd, it's hard to know where to begin.

I will always speak my mind, stand up for myself, and stand up for the people I love - no matter what color their skin is. Far-Left political pundits keep attacking me because I'm a Black conservative. _I don't fit into their worldview of how a Black person is supposed to think and act._

**It's time we sent them a message. You can help prove them wrong - and blow their minds - by helping this Black conservative get elected to the United States Senate. **

I'd like to show our critics exactly how much grassroots support my campaign has. **[Would you please stand with me and make a contribution today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f00963940e794f6e926b28e989e11545&_e=AA-wacMzeAcHga7-kdDsosSHIQCjlRUrO0uTqoR2jLY7oIN_7xuglNAOvvDNYf4p4hqm8HF5xoUu7oQOZVapj5Es2Y75O22FtRDm_KSiGMgkkMKEHR5cfWamee_IJQaEsDOk5uZbTUlwDyBm2CI7811OSjOK2PIE4ZvClWBhnzSOa8vP-gkMI7uOCWOrLCYTMmgAO3nuMjOmycIxwzaDq8Ybl6bzgeORibrmm_xSMRMVYPtSfmc1FmA6__H8plh8naLe4S7exVQstY-V4j4JVsutPyqunbYVyNCLel9HjHBvJAFcS_s8HIaXuq9GcDfdSKdluuT3Ad-__thPORxdYhFClP5CvJkbYHQl53DPr01tXkDijWlz8SF5-4PL1mWEDO6if0jPkEBRp27ZcVJWhwTCf-FyxKdUFdvB8jb45HhasTgKQDz8UEtVbsHdnLCBAriVCAP35yHTN90cAGDWoYsrru9U3ULuKw26RZqDf4d7r5C5oN6SYYLGYfajeUlQ)**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We need to blanket the airwaves and get this campaign’s message in front of as many voters as possible—that means keeping our current ads on the air and funding new ones.
#
Peter—despite JD Vance’s massive financial advantage thanks to billionaire Peter Thiel and Donald Trump, _we’re still neck-and-neck in this race._
**We’ve got them on the ropes, and now it’s time for a full-court press.**
We need to blanket the airwaves and get this campaign’s message in front of as many voters as possible—that means keeping our current ads on the air and funding new ones.
**To keep MAGA millionaire JD and his billionaire backers on their heels, we’re setting an ambitious $175,000 goal to fund our TV ads. ****[Can you split $5 to my campaign and Patty Murray’s to help us kick things off?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47332319/353920819/1432415365?refcode=pm_em_220703_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI3MjI2Ny04ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_O-wszYLBTicBhJ0n7XqrOK1sGhoWrcQlP-JSnC2ow=)**
Our pollsters say that the key to flipping Ohio depends on getting our message in front of anyone and everyone across the Buckeye State— _the more people hear about this campaign, the more they like it._
So like I said, this is a huge opportunity— _but it also comes with a huge gamble._
Going all-in on TV ads is crucial to winning this race, but if we fall short of our fundraising goal, we risk burning through our resources too quickly. **That means we’ll have to pull our ads down early, right when they’re at the highest point of impact.**
**[Can I count on you to split $5 to my campaign and Patty Murray now? We have a massive opportunity to fight back against JD’s attacks and take one huge step toward expanding our Democratic Senate majority—but only if you pitch in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47332320/353920820/1432415365?refcode=pm_em_220703_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI3MjI2Ny04ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_O-wszYLBTicBhJ0n7XqrOK1sGhoWrcQlP-JSnC2ow=)**
Thanks,
Tim Ryan

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47332321/353920821/1432415365?refcode=pm_em_220703_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI3MjI2Ny04ZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_O-wszYLBTicBhJ0n7XqrOK1sGhoWrcQlP-JSnC2ow=)****

body:
|
| | | It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text, and my heart sank:

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713460:J4IwOOonN:m:1:3299561967:EC0795C61668255FAED5F13330755C27:r)
---

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713460:J4IwOOonN:m:1:3299561967:EC0795C61668255FAED5F13330755C27:r "Generic
Button")
---

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? Any donation will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713460:J4IwOOonN:m:1:3299561967:EC0795C61668255FAED5F13330755C27:r "Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5,
$10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713460:J4IwOOonN:m:1:3299561967:EC0795C61668255FAED5F13330755C27:r "BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember,
all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713460:J4IwOOonN:m:1:3299561967:EC0795C61668255FAED5F13330755C27:r "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

She's depositing max-out checks.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvjihdqp8p7g5c3rp7md58eimd8i79vtu6iti710_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shlckq66dhimerj0sb1c6qe6tlmeuo72p7168rm5c9i65pn9cj2edrr4tbje4rrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33c5lmhjr4cj666rjbd37m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4cb6jcv7n5gmr9a14rhsdfaa9hfoh5jnn3fej2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z46olq41c3r6ths3l6ijgeu7d1v72ademqnu9kug_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn820tjleglh0oluda8pb9mo5divfrhk24ck9pm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5elotsotebmrtedg1k7ea1ns94pr6juvhpon0sg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvondtm3h65gcgfgvem0hftva3butoqvijp341c0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm7k5530aviegdot802o9olhf1p73h61q3uci51g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg6jm6t4n8agga3f8gk32te3gq27s07jh43umoe8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlqdfu6i7gd11vnc1g3e70r6a2qkpee2gh5p1v6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z84d358mc7p3u7331se9h8qnb718s8imv12qrdo0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmtbp76feoqqinseqkhfii988joj9natbtcdnu7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztetamgf03o2uer6cec0n029krnnej0esth5ckto_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdc6mkn6ad0rm0c6bd05vgo7j406t27hlj93u5a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjo2pjji39r2fo1tfv8s4uncak4kljhqt8k5lls8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z97sdq8jdvhhit4d35vbmc41m3v8u5p7u3814k7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8v1ij5bgqhihs502hmf0k2lqo4f5kdq9kmr15j8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6a7kuegp06n32l3b7criqpu2sajta858jao5d0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjcjrll8jgi6srlrkqlmpr0ianoh76al2l7b4c70_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdaleg8v2loenn6hfgsdblhmhnh9d3ec6a80rec8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c3h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z6apjr5m5dadffjfd0d0chp3d62mv5du7119k2vo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm9hv1mblmtsp33dn27mm1orpds1bj01l5hqoa00_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cdge2oj5c5ge49fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Watch and share this course on DVD
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zstumeugjqon686pd2scainfhg3ciqvi13bi5fg0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u2r61oj2car6cstkc2p31c34m1g6acb4stg70opl6ur66s34sphm3ctgmjhr5dtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shmcor6eddhc1p36phh62p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cdge2oj5cphm49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsl1iitj9mcgv4h6qkus1ir4i70gco4e2v9uqr6g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb6cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpcp59ik6h7ckc65oc2slov8m0pulvnabnv9enig_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb6cdh2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zckhma4hvm4uk7d16i175b7cru1musn1ted26vp8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb6cdh2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z87knafg3qbgi3nekncvfae8avgp28gvp9krg5po_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb6cdh2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z73n34ko6dki2f288fusk0me7nug7p2v36kem9g0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8rcops3uiaim9a05d0gab5vlur9v0jj7363tvd0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cdge2oj5cphm49fg)

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: What ?!?!?!

body:

name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Passing along this URGENT request from young conservatives
body:
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z742u1p9e9oc6vg32kmq8ti58if9s09l9tsrkvgg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfad9mmerb8tbnc5oe3dhie6p67d1lmqqn2pb3mdpj9d9n64om6pdmc1q69ojlmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8r6cdj76mom0shkcoq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcuf83linpu993v5qnrmdlq3j8e6t92ncltvr1t0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c1h2bs) Fellow Conservative, I just received an urgent request from my staff on behalf of 50 young conservatives. I’ve forwarded it to you below. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training program is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. My staffer Bryan, who oversees the Leadership Institute’s campus programs, sent an urgent email to let me know **the demand by students to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [ **Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfg2n66a1r3ikeehj8d5atva0rqr7747bv4lhiuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c1h2bs) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj3aioet53cru3f7m92ef48ateio1anqnkn45i8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4pb1c1h2bs) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
* * *
**From:** Bryan Bernys
**To:** Morton Blackwell
**Subject:** URGENT: Do we have any more scholarships? Morton, I just got confirmation that we can move the National Youth Leadership School to the university auditorium. That takes care of the classroom space issues we had. But now there’s a financial issue. With the increase in travel costs, we’ve used up everything in the scholarship fund for students’ travel and hotel rooms. My team still have **50 more applications** to process from students who want to come to the training. Is there any room left in the budget for more student travel scholarships? I don’t want to have to tell my team to turn students away who can’t afford to come, but there’s no other option if we can’t get more scholarship funding. Please let me know how to proceed as soon as possible. Respectfully, Bryan \--
**Bryan Bernys**
Vice President for the Campus Leadership Program
Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Great America Update
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6116%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=6W7oZppvmVUZeWbWsFNpjg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63275%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S9cM6JWbE7fSeGXpEOzRBQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63276%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H5H%2fvwonZB91nkruQYO4wA&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63277%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t9dzRHeGTPcnKRvyrKpGaQ&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6116%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=6W7oZppvmVUZeWbWsFNpjg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6116%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=6W7oZppvmVUZeWbWsFNpjg&sysid=1)

They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ The Federalist Papers ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: Pete Sepp
subject: Step-by-step guide to end Biden’s inflation
body:
The National Taxpayers Union (NTU) is one of the sole voices on Capitol Hill fighting to end Biden’s record-breaking inflation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zppdk37rlkfi7hd76stfdao1uavrm7374015dghg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq32sj16tj7cdphm8q34tlgmgpn8dr3elo6fdhm6qr6bd1mmcp66d5nmeprat5nmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666obbd37m8p6cdb0mdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clhm1ob2c5h64oh5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zic48d2lmidlavo8p97218v9ir0imhc4qk44t1v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)
Friend,

The National Taxpayers Union (NTU) is one of the sole voices on Capitol Hill fighting to end Biden's record-breaking inflation, but there's a big problem...

Surprise!

Most members of Congress have no idea what creates inflation, how to stop it, or what to do next.

NTU's team includes lobbyists for YOU and all taxpayers to fight for tax reform, balanced budgets, and pro-growth policies. Sadly, part of our job is educating these politicians on the basics of how an economy works.

**This is why I am publishing a _step-by-step guide to ending Joe Biden 's inflation_. **

[_**Before you read it below, I 'm inviting you to support the National Taxpayers Union with a donation of $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount so we can FIGHT inflation and win public policy battles. Click here to donate.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znu3bfpfdvdl4k9e1k9ktaeoatd6j6ndal82dpvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)

Reversing the trend of inflation is no easy task. But remember, NTU was around in the 1970s and 80s when inflation was last rampant. We know what works and what doesn't.

Before I break down how the National Taxpayers Union can help Congress end Joe Biden's skyrocketing inflation numbers, **_let 's start by talking about how we got here_. **

* **The Federal Reserve set interest rates irresponsibly low.** This incentivized massive debt accumulation in both the private and public sectors.
* **Politicians ran TRILLION dollar deficits, sinking us into a $30 trillion national debt.** The CARES Act in 2020 may or may not have been an overreaction in federal spending, but it turns out the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021 certainly was a mistake. Just eight years from now, net interest on the debt is projected to top 1 trillion dollars!
* **The Fed printed massively increased the money supply during the pandemic.** Between March 2020 and the end of 2021, the Fed bought up roughly $6 trillion in the economy with money it created. That increase in our money supply has led to record inflation levels and is destroying the middle class and our economy.
* **This money printing created bubbles in the stock market and real estate.** Now, the bubbles are popping, and millions of Americans are watching their retirement savings fall to pieces.

Are you still with me? I think so, but too bad so many public officials don't get it!

**In short:** The government printed and spent FAR too much money without a plan to pay it back, restore responsible interest rates, or prevent inflation.

[_**You can help the National Taxpayers Union FIGHT BACK against this madness by making an online donation today. Please click here to make an investment in the future of our country, help us fight inflation, and advocate for taxpayers >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za865h58m0i4tv542106atup808ptma7c24kbijg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)

Now, there's one more thing we need to discuss before we discuss NTU's plan to fight inflation.

I promise we're getting there.

My goal is to show you the problem and present you with a solution so you and I can reverse the inflation nightmare.

**Here is the impact inflation has on our economy and our lives: **

* **Inflation hurts young people and first-time home buyers:** Inflation makes a young person's dream of buying their first home impossible. Young workers and families can't build wealth in an inflationary environment.
* **Inflation hurts seniors and retirees:** Those who can no longer work must watch as the purchasing power of their savings dwindle. Inflation destroys the quality of life of seniors in our country.
* **Inflation hurts small businesses, entrepreneurs, and everyday Americans:** Supply chain shortages, the cost of gas, rising prices for food at home, increases in rent and housing... Inflation impacts all of us. And remember, even though many parts of the federal tax code are inflation protected - the standard deduction and the rate brackets grow with the cost of living - inflation still hurts taxpayers. You still pay taxes on phantom inflationary capital gains and, depending on where you live, your state may be bumping you into higher tax brackets just for keeping up with the cost of living!

Joe Biden and the Federal Reserve's reckless behavior have created record-breaking inflation and sent us into a deep recession.

**Here is the National Taxpayers Union 's plan to end Joe Biden's inflation:**

To be clear: We can't solve the inflation problem instantly. However, I believe NTU's plans will have a major impact on taxpayers and revitalize our economy.

Here are some direct steps Congress can take to reduce inflation:

* **Increase Domestic Energy supply:** The President restricted how much federal land could be used for drilling oil and natural gas... Meanwhile, the cost of energy has exploded by over 50%!

NTU is pushing lawmakers to unleash domestic energy producers to reduce prices at the pump. This will create jobs in our country and provide immediate relief to taxpayers.

[_**Help NTU fight inflation at the gas pump by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt4va52fo3845akggmknc0lq2mcj46c3a936orio_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)

* **Repeal Tariffs And Harmful Import Bans:** We must reform the Jones Act, which restricts how cargo ships can transport goods between U.S. ports.

This creates supply chain problems and shortages, as well as increasing prices on everyday items.

Trade tariffs have DOUBLED since 2018... We must repeal these to reduce the cost of doing business with other countries!

Here is a frustrating example of government import bans and tariffs: The U.S. has a ban on importing baby formula from the European Union. There is a shortage of baby formula in the United States, and this is an easy solution to ease the pain.

[_**Help NTU fight inflation by embracing what works - >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3uhbtdl3mfela3bv9at4p8oqssan48gir9ks8e8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)

* **Reduce Spending And Stop Printing Trillions Of New Debt:** This should be obvious. We must stop passing budgets or "continuing resolutions" with trillion-dollar deficits. Not only does this harm future generations, but we are damaging our credibility with nation-states, businesses, and lenders around the world.

And the Federal Reserve must turn off the money-printing machine. We cannot survive another round of massive increases in our money supply.

What do you think?

This is a serious problem, Friend.

But I believe the National Taxpayers Union can fight to restore our economy and enact policies that reduce inflation, create jobs, and unleash the free market.

I know...

This is a long email.

You deserve to know the truth about inflation and read about real-world examples of things we can do to fight inflation.

NTU isn't like some loudmouth politician with no substance or ideas... Our team has helped enact historic tax and IRS reform for 50 years. Including helping President Ronald Reagan and President Donald Trump implement their tax cuts. When President Ford unveiled "WIN" - Whip Inflation Now - in the 1970s, do you know what we did? In a headline-making move, we unveiled a campaign called "LOSE" - Let's Oppose Stupid Expenditures - and got politicians thinking about controlling budget deficits. It helped!

Our record of winning public policy battles gives me confidence we can weather this storm and come out on top. But I need your help.

I am asking you to make a donation of ANY amount you can while we are in this critical battle. Please use one of the links below to donate:
[_**Donate $10 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp5ejd4p86butgbv4pr4kkhs1bav1sd2a3fd8lto_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $20.22 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm28lnuavc4ii87jprd3ricj38cle3580n7anrro_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmactncd7jtorkc8j5quvn76hs541ikhjb31q9v8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z01q9cd0t2s1n2ptkd9gcilokssh9phdoeu1n6j8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm6u6lhtsoi64cabe6m8argkq0rcegrcknh7mgkg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8s5biiq4d882cp89b7b4qcjreeh64fi7jiige0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn6ndk25qv7jni5n9pmo1gifu6mo95m12k85bvfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4jghk400bu4l4nj28q4g3lisnel54unnav26978_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)

Friend, I have two big hopes for this message.

**First:** I hope you can see how NTU has a REAL plan to fight inflation. We're not simply spewing talking points. The National Taxpayers Union is committed to fighting for YOU and getting us out of this economic jam. I love this country and am ready to stand up for it.

**Second:** I hope you will decide to take action by supporting NTU with a contribution.

We can't do this without you.

If you are moved to support our mission, [_**please click here to donate any amount.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztvrnnanpdrr4edc5kiq4vgv5agentn6uepkphbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Pete Sepp
President
National Taxpayers Union
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zogu9v85q0t71ihp3d2p286hsg7d76k9pd4b23ig).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp9ol1r5auap1hkdh3oa0043hjej7alm9ia464j8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm4ob2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

# Weekly Newsletter
---
| July 3, 2022 | Issue XXII
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on Congressman Lee Zeldin's Gubernatorial Primary Win
Tuesday, June 28, 2022
Congratulations to Lee Zeldin on his victory in tonight's Republican primary.
Lee Zeldin and Alison Esposito are battle-tested leaders who truly understand the challenges this state is facing, and they have what it takes to finally return common sense and accountability to the Governor's mansion.
As we move toward the November election, New Yorkers are energized to reject the Albany Democrat's unaffordable, pro-criminal agenda. I look forward to working together to take back the State Senate, elect Republicans to statewide office and deliver a safer, stronger and more affordable state to the people of New York.
---
|
---
| |
---
| Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Announces Revolving Loan Fund for Niagara County
---
---
On Tuesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt announced that with the help of our Federal representatives, Niagara County has been awarded the Revolving Loan Fund of $3.9 million. These monies will help fund the clean up process of brownfield projects, ranging from cleaning up buildings with asbestos or lead contamination, to assessing and cleaning up abandoned properties. After the clean up is done, these properties can be used for redevelopment.
---
| [READ THE RELEASE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CJfbiwac6gPn15oFfg166Vr_CTOyAO-1myH5oRjm17ILA4eJBsrVY4rwd3RU4CneyW6DmqIEKDe70_Nnvy5EN_rUq-7y8xAwCcDzq3qfSRc0qrIlEPillOYuFRe6OM-JpjCgtjYBE-G11zjuLZGIgG_L2gjvagWMPjSBpE7dblc6ptoLDlWKF273gVWLFoTydElEd2QISpeOCgcagVO50uD-hMqaAJafCzZ2ownIlA5qpofuSrt-LTQoF8CWM6Rnh9dJFlJxW0=&c=Y5I3DKAYB67ySdsBpPMv6xViSKZJoNXX_pKnuSEYEEhfFMqzQyc6dQ==&ch=OnU5FT-bgPeQboavnzWU00MipDIVNb8DnW0ccFpLrnrqVIYAj2sKYg==)
---
| Op-ed: State should embrace future as nation's crypto capital
By Rob Ortt
---
---
New York Democrats in the state Legislature recently voted to halt cryptocurrency mining operations in our state, and recent reports suggest that Gov. Kathy Hochul will look at the bill "very closely" before deciding whether to sign or veto it.
If the governor signs this bill, it will harm the growing cryptocurrency mining industry in upstate New York and the Empire State's emerging blockchain technology development sector. Instead of blocking progress, state leaders should be focused on making New York the nation's crypto capital.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CJfbiwac6gPn15oFfg166Vr_CTOyAO-1myH5oRjm17ILA4eJBsrVY4rwd3RU4Cn5Tz7JeML8pHkS9tLT9d1rcvJmwaGZnnAooO61tEPTrK-BVn1dMPFYcRVgrsk3nBenYugH3fCiccNDcGq4aL-1q9IOYQA_5clf5lGYqOiPjD3aUITNti40bzBweFWjmAFGEkk-quBXjCZwEt5JLUEoYPggfsvr2MCIZgdcvueDlQ=&c=Y5I3DKAYB67ySdsBpPMv6xViSKZJoNXX_pKnuSEYEEhfFMqzQyc6dQ==&ch=OnU5FT-bgPeQboavnzWU00MipDIVNb8DnW0ccFpLrnrqVIYAj2sKYg==)
---
| |
---
| |
### Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt
On the "Extraordinary" Session Friday, July 2, 2022
After hours of delays, Governor Hochul's "extraordinary" session finally convened to make New Yorkers less safe and less free, with no accountability and no transparency. Instead of addressing the root of the problem and holding violent criminals accountable, Albany politicians are preventing law-abiding New Yorkers, who have undergone permit classes, background checks, and a licensing process from exercising their constitutional right to keep and bear arms. Senate Democrats even rejected an amendment to increase penalties on individuals who commit crimes with illegal firearms while attacking the rights of legal gun owners. The Governor and her allies can claim all they want that this was an "extraordinary" session, but New Yorkers know the truth: the only thing "extraordinary" is Albany's never ending failure to restore public safety or make our state more affordable.
---
| [VIEW THE STATEMENT ONLINE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CJfbiwac6gPn15oFfg166Vr_CTOyAO-1myH5oRjm17ILA4eJBsrVY4rwd3RU4CnssP4ISzM3aiKCV9Srq9D1lWyPecfh2bWgWRZEeytU2zSQp1AqjSwyEhBJn7-TKA2vRp0BXM6RK35yay-Ch9lmMxlmUzWf2Pn3N9icrpcfYj9gYyu6xgZ6R2MLdoWzibdOpnttxmFE2u2jdiY_mgIgK5euXa4J6QV&c=Y5I3DKAYB67ySdsBpPMv6xViSKZJoNXX_pKnuSEYEEhfFMqzQyc6dQ==&ch=OnU5FT-bgPeQboavnzWU00MipDIVNb8DnW0ccFpLrnrqVIYAj2sKYg==)
---
| |
---
| Repeal the HALT Act!
---
---
| Under One-Party-Rule's pro-criminal agenda, violence has not only increased on the streets, but within correction facilities too.
We NEED to protect our brave corrections officers by REPEALING this legislation.
---
| |
---
Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media:
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CJfbiwac6gPn15oFfg166Vr_CTOyAO-1myH5oRjm17ILA4eJBsrVeYKVv9MfgWyUCGGdvSkE7PR0d4izZL6lyOYTcRFQzHrYAjOw-r-3RgLHrn0wVy3ukQIoD_baNSQ0TsU0a3L_EH8Hc6JNt3sOa9F75oV7X-xPohCpSk_nQA=&c=Y5I3DKAYB67ySdsBpPMv6xViSKZJoNXX_pKnuSEYEEhfFMqzQyc6dQ==&ch=OnU5FT-bgPeQboavnzWU00MipDIVNb8DnW0ccFpLrnrqVIYAj2sKYg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CJfbiwac6gPn15oFfg166Vr_CTOyAO-1myH5oRjm17ILA4eJBsrVVY5MV-VjAb5Vz3mghQQa8p049RHTy5Qpk29gADsbsHMRhe1FZBr7FC17Ca83b6zVMOnlXTUsvyCPlXH0xR5X85T8UURVECGH08kDDC3N0YV&c=Y5I3DKAYB67ySdsBpPMv6xViSKZJoNXX_pKnuSEYEEhfFMqzQyc6dQ==&ch=OnU5FT-bgPeQboavnzWU00MipDIVNb8DnW0ccFpLrnrqVIYAj2sKYg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019CJfbiwac6gPn15oFfg166Vr_CTOyAO-1myH5oRjm17ILA4eJBsrVaErTsf6pmBGpydgiLFPUafbwQGlAFoYt245604vba07qAd1qFjTv4Ylj0YCK7KJr5jLQ1pUUcF2r8DnxK2C8v7_0btXKHsH3unHmGhpl3BCKoY-R4H_gJo=&c=Y5I3DKAYB67ySdsBpPMv6xViSKZJoNXX_pKnuSEYEEhfFMqzQyc6dQ==&ch=OnU5FT-bgPeQboavnzWU00MipDIVNb8DnW0ccFpLrnrqVIYAj2sKYg==)

clean_body: Sunday, July 3rd Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | July 3, 2022 | Issue XXII | | | | | | | Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on Congressman Lee Zeldin's Gubernatorial Primary Win Tuesday, June 28, 2022 Congratulations to Lee Zeldin on his victory in tonight's Republican primary. Lee Zeldin and Alison Esposito are battle-tested leaders who truly understand the challenges this state is facing, and they have what it takes to finally return common sense and accountability to the Governor's mansion. As we move toward the November election, New Yorkers are energized to reject the Albany Democrat's unaffordable, pro-criminal agenda. I look forward to working together to take back the State Senate, elect Republicans to statewide office and deliver a safer, stronger and more affordable state to the people of New York. | | | | Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Announces Revolving Loan Fund for Niagara County On Tuesday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt announced that with the help of our Federal representatives, Niagara County has been awarded the Revolving Loan Fund of $3.9 million. These monies will help fund the clean up process of brownfield projects, ranging from cleaning up buildings with asbestos or lead contamination, to assessing and cleaning up abandoned properties. After the clean up is done, these properties can be used for redevelopment. | == | Op-ed: State should embrace future as nation's crypto capital By Rob Ortt New York Democrats in the state Legislature recently voted to halt cryptocurrency mining operations in our state, and recent reports suggest that Gov. Kathy Hochul will look at the bill "very closely" before deciding whether to sign or veto it. If the governor signs this bill, it will harm the growing cryptocurrency mining industry in upstate New York and the Empire State's emerging blockchain technology development sector. Instead of blocking progress, state leaders should be focused on making New York the nation's crypto capital. | == | | | | Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt On the "Extraordinary" Session Friday, July 2, 2022 After hours of delays, Governor Hochul's "extraordinary" session finally convened to make New Yorkers less safe and less free, with no accountability and no transparency. Instead of addressing the root of the problem and holding violent criminals accountable, Albany politicians are preventing law-abiding New Yorkers, who have undergone permit classes, background checks, and a licensing process from exercising their constitutional right to keep and bear arms. Senate Democrats even rejected an amendment to increase penalties on individuals who commit crimes with illegal firearms while attacking the rights of legal gun owners. The Governor and her allies can claim all they want that this was an "extraordinary" session, but New Yorkers know the truth: the only thing "extraordinary" is Albany's never ending failure to restore public safety or make our state more affordable. | == | | | Repeal the HALT Act! | Under One-Party-Rule's pro-criminal agenda, violence has not only increased on the streets, but within correction facilities too. name: Morton Blackwell
subject: Will you sponsor a conservative student’sscholarship
body:
I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the L
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znvmri2i7olmcvf9kp9heoc30dfsj55704eb6n40_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm6o33c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongchhbeob3chi30pr36dor6clgc8rm8tb3e5jreob0ehge2ohiedrrad3kmqo70puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdgmmq6fchmcoq61ddhcuobapbi4no)
I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z31r0407hc9ir2vpsok6rdlaaohk446l0fbt5250_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm6o33c9h2bs) Fellow Conservative, I have an urgent request on behalf of 50 young conservatives. Please help them. My name is Morton Blackwell, president of the **Leadership Institute**. This organization is America’s premier training organization for conservatives. The Leadership Institute’s flagship training programs is coming up in a few days. This National Youth Leadership School provides the “bootcamp of politics” for young conservatives. Here, we help college students become the next generation of conservative leaders. **My staff just sent me an urgent email to let me know the demand to attend this special training greatly exceeded expectations.** More than 350 dedicated conservative students have applied to attend. This would be by far my largest Youth Leadership School ever. My staff secured the faculty resources and classroom space to meet the high demand. **But the rise in travel costs from inflation have exhausted the student scholarship funds.** The Leadership Institute provides scholarships to students to cover all travel and housing costs to attend this crucial training in Arlington, Virginia. As I see it, **financial burdens should never hold a young person back from learning to champion the principles that make America great. I hope you’ll agree with me on that.** The students applying for this program are some of the best and brightest young conservatives in America. They’re eager to spend their 4th of July weekend to learn to make a difference for their principles. These young people are the future leaders of our conservative movement and our country. I don’t want to have to turn a single one of them away because they can’t afford to travel here for their training. Here’s where you come in. **Will you make a special gift right now to make sure every young conservative who wants to can afford to attend this crucial training?** [**Yes, I'll give a special gift for the scholarship fund** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrtcoqrpcvdt2k98r1u83gmc0ctdao08prdsml1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm6o33c9h2bs) Due to inflation, the total cost for a student scholarship has risen to $1,200 for travel and housing. That’s a significant amount for any one person to give, so I’m asking many other generous conservatives besides you. My goal today is to have 50 conservatives step up to give gifts of $25 each to cover the cost of one more student scholarship. **Will you give $25, or whatever your best gift may be, to help fund a student scholarship?** If so, please use this link to give online right away: [**https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/yls-scholarship**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqrvaha52n7mtm6tso4kiq5k5jjeu6sma4osj6r0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gm6o33c9h2bs) Thank you for considering this urgent request to help young conservatives grow into the next generation of conservative leaders for America. Cordially, **Morton C. Blackwell**
President, Leadership Institute
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9380%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RfaMfsII3Zs7GQEu0NgcRA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36422%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hA1Mw1zSPGFz8BGxrlCVUA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36423%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3w2ksJehuuijG%2bD7RT7Urw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36424%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rmbvPg6anTLfXIDVIt0D8g&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9380%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RfaMfsII3Zs7GQEu0NgcRA&sysid=1)_

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlin3u4148n9tkrqr7s8achn2oed3otdpqk49rp0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onim8qnat9k68oj1p5n6epn6ob6m6q7cd366dpb9o3mc4ojeclk6cqefcj4euorfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdgmmq6fchncor6eddgcuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pb3c3gmeo71c1h2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbip3s9il92c937suqpbp0tpv9cui6oi2r2sisi0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gmeo71c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3e3fbq29ir2cqjbevngkuc069qr10pui9ct28lo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gmeo71c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zah4f7sh9utsn4qllrqdl8lp5qqhs271iar0d8j0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3gmeo71c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Team NDRC
subject: Our 2022 strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
It’s simple: Win seats, flip chambers, and protect our majorities.
|
---

---
Friend, we'll get straight to the point: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47334180/353925695/-2119415107?amount=20&refcode=20220703.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMmQzMGFkLWM3ZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KzzrYKMfGl2G4VIlGTnix9FQKYvREYv23b13Uso3Ls4=)
---
If we’re going to preserve not only our democracy, but also abortion rights, LGBTQ rights, and progress on every important issue facing the country right now,** we have to do everything possible to build political power everywhere we can** — which is why we’re targeting key races in 17 states this November.
**But friend, we wouldn’t be able to execute any part of our multi-pronged strategy without the support of people like you. Will you pitch in $10 or more right now to help us keep up our work all over the country?**

body:
I'm FURIOUS
We can't let this happen

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713476:JoLKgOoN8:m:1:3299561967:D72CED23314FA54E769CE4ED9E3914EB:r)

It's Gov. Ron DeSantis - and**I 'm FURIOUS. **

You know I don't send texts like this often, but we're facing the biggest deadline yet & we're OUT of time.

**What happens today will decide everything. **

I can't believe it: Joe Biden & Chuck Schumer dropped a whopping $20+ MILLION bucks to destroy my friend & our Nevada GOP nominee, Adam Laxalt, in the MOST important Senate race on the map.

If the Democrats beat us & keep this seat blue, it's all over.
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help by midnight tonight.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713476:JoLKgOoN8:m:1:3299561967:D72CED23314FA54E769CE4ED9E3914EB:r)

**
This is our one chance to hand Biden, Schumer, and the liberal news media a crushing defeat.**

Adam is a former Naval Officer & Iraq War Veteran, and a God-fearing American like us. He is everything the radical Left fears the most. Adam has my full support, and I hope he will have yours too.

But he stands ZERO chance if we don't get help from grassroots supporters like you right now. **Don 't let the radical left smear and destroy a good man. **

Believe me when I say, this is the single most important thing you can do to help save America.

[**The clock is ticking. Time is up. The deadline is NOW. Please, I 'm personally asking.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713476:JoLKgOoN8:m:1:3299561967:D72CED23314FA54E769CE4ED9E3914EB:r)

Hello,
After I won the Democratic nomination for Senate against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa, my campaign saw an incredible surge of donations. But since then, our online fundraising has _really_ slowed down...
I’ll be honest: This is really not good. Fox “News” and Chuck Grassley have started shamelessly attacking me and my military service, and I cannot fight back if we don’t have the resources to counter their lies.
The early polls show this will be an incredibly close race – just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Chuck Grassley – and if we win and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority for another two years.
But I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to send Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue this November, I need grassroots donors like you to give right now:
[**I am urgently asking: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before our critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47334996/353928552/-42398318?refcode=em20220703am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmJlZTUwZi1kMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dPPfqpsFS95jhAt7cCSf5bLPBwSH1GVRHWxH48etNrk=)

Hello Peter,
As a top supporter I wanted you to be among the first to know about my next fight.
To help defeat the radical indoctrination of our babies in schools all across this country, I've just signed on as National Spokesperson for 1776 Action.
There are so many local battles that must be won, but right now, there's a very dangerous bill in the U.S. Senate that all of us must work together to stop.
[I ask you to learn more by taking just a few minutes to watch the short video I just recorded for you, and join me in this fight by adding your name to the 1776 Pledge. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hliRrYHtpq_ScZhE1EYozJBluTij1Gf6chFWsXYrqoOUMcbeKcxGA6lwd8XZvFxNwiqIRmO_BNQm9miJSyH-Sru7jAw2z4eccMP11miu5qEE2DtvPDmxUPEmh_4JRhMHDaKWFetxeiPtiTJist8khOe3WFyQicsD3y1QNOSCANZT5ocFaKN_UxtWYq48yC0i&c=dpuA9mewXCifJD08FbO8T_lIPEMgTXEZ6QGUvmcqXV0seCZmJwex-g==&ch=CzNhL1yk2X5DLKvWHWEDZnhIk9L8kBvReMQ386WHtCml_Taa_-uFSQ==)

Kathy, National Spokeswoman for 1776 Action

Peter, on Thursday, the Supreme Court handed down a decision that will _severely_ weaken the EPA’s ability to regulate greenhouse gas emissions.

This latest blow to our fight against climate change will have repercussions that extend far beyond the borders of the U.S. This decision is a major setback in a fight that we’re rapidly running out of time to win.

**That’s why, in light of the Supreme Court’s latest dangerous ruling, I’m calling on Congress to take meaningful action on climate change.[I need at least 5,000 fearless fighters to stand with me, so add your name here if you agree that it’s far past time Congress took action to combat the climate crisis!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47335630/353930986/-1299654696?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk585-su-nd&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-climate-epa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGRlYTZiZS1kMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvB3O0NDdODmhpEdhpCNz4Fv1sbu4YOToJrICbYvJxE=&emci=d138f865-4bf9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=94dea6be-d0fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

Peter, we can’t talk about the climate crisis without acknowledging who is already being hurt the most: Black and brown communities. For generations, environmental racism has run rampant in these communities, and – with climate change continuing to advance – these neighborhoods will continue to bear the brunt of the harm.

**We cannot achieve justice and equality without first addressing the climate crisis – and that’s why I need your help now.** With the Supreme Court stripping progress away bit by bit – first by weakening commonsense gun control, then by overturning _Roe_ , and now by eroding the EPA’s power – we MUST stand up for justice.

**Peter, I’m counting on you to be one of the 5,000 supporters I need to sign my petition by midnight tonight.[Please, will you add your name to demand that Congress takes immediate action on the climate crisis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47335632/353931015/-1299654696?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk585-su-nd&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY22-climate-epa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGRlYTZiZS1kMGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wvB3O0NDdODmhpEdhpCNz4Fv1sbu4YOToJrICbYvJxE=&emci=d138f865-4bf9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=94dea6be-d0fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share Your Thoughts on the Future of the American Dream
body:
We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7n6kkuoidmoirmukr464hvha4mb9bsu0rda6c50_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3imcpj4cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcp5mmkrb1orheao78ptie3jb0pbgmsqe9dtkcurm4s75c9gmbc3he2o6eo9icurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8r6cdj4mmr30slhcooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zet4fnhppl8jacmrude3uv4j9mlpeusfb6770vjg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3imcpj4cdh2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach—especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsi2adstaf7vibeq156eh96fnlnpfr40tmqu2aqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3imcpj4cdh2bs)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: **[https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcbib9vr6b3oqbgkhohu2sntadpm7ecvcqb4nm6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3imcpj4cdh2bs)** Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. McIndoe [**QUESTION 1: Do you believe the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory are destroying the American education system?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5qi87gdeho9c6cgg9o7qq6g6g519bthv1skh4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3imcpj4cdh2bs)

---

disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
(sign my petition) |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47336467/353934530/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220703_p_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM5ZDYyNS1kMmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UL_gxySTzke72vBR38PnQlojKAf1Mc6kepVv2elA8Vw=)
---
Folks,

During their Supreme Court confirmation hearings, Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch testified, under oath, that in their view _Roe v. Wade_ was settled law.

Then, as we all know, they both joined the Court’s majority opinion overturning _Roe v. Wade_ — and half a century of settled law. This means only one thing: **_Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch lied under oath to the U.S. Senate._**

**_[Perjury is a crime. And if perjury is found to have occurred, the correct remedy is impeachment. I’m circulating a petition calling on the Senate to impeach Justices Kavanaugh and Gorsuch for lying in their confirmation hearings. Will you add your name?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47336469/353934534/420698447?refcode=20220703_p_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM5ZDYyNS1kMmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UL_gxySTzke72vBR38PnQlojKAf1Mc6kepVv2elA8Vw=&emci=cddd7a04-90f8-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=dc39d625-d2fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**

But we can’t just respond to this vile, unconstitutional, and anti-American decision. body:
Peter:

Pro-abortion radical TERRORISTS have declared "Summer of Rage" on pro-life groups and crisis pregnancy centers.

**And they are even targeting Supreme Court justices and the entire Supreme Court itself.**

**[That's why I hope I can count on you to chip in an emergency contribution of $20.22 right away to help me take back congress](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60417747:Wpqog1hWN:m:1:2365227053:3CC898E66225B71F97449813C0DEF0AA:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60417747:Wpqog1hWN:m:1:2365227053:3CC898E66225B71F97449813C0DEF0AA:r) [**DEFEND THE SUPREME COURT
DONATE TODAY **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60417747:Wpqog1hWN:m:1:2365227053:3CC898E66225B71F97449813C0DEF0AA:r) **Because what's even more disgusting is these pro-abortion criminals are being led by Democrats like AOC and Maxine Waters.**

It was AOC who told them to "take to the streets" and Maxine Waters who said they should "defy the court."

And it was all started by Democrat Senate leader Chuck Schumer who told violent pro-abortion activists to "unleash the whirlwind."

_The only way you and I can protect the Supreme Court from these Socialists and their schemes to destroy the court is to work together to stop them_.

You see, their calls for violence are just one part of the plan to destroy the court.

**They also want to pack the court with as many as six new leftwing ideologues while impeaching Clarence Thomas and other conservative justices.**

**[So I hope you will join me in this all-important fight with a contribution right away of $20.22, $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 $1,000, or even $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60417747:Wpqog1hWN:m:1:2365227053:3CC898E66225B71F97449813C0DEF0AA:r).**

Together we can stop the destruction of the Supreme Court and end this reign of terror against our Supreme Court, our nation, and our Constitution. [**HELP PROTECT THE SUPREME COURT
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60417747:Wpqog1hWN:m:1:2365227053:3CC898E66225B71F97449813C0DEF0AA:r) **_Thanks for Standing Strong,_**

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9394%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=t3f3fypybWWkQX%2fT%2bVvLfg&sysid=1)
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children’s future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn’t good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama’s extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama’s administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife’s--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats’ complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government’s failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans’ lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else’s fight, this is our fight, and it’s a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I’d like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don’t feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn’t your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven’t made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don’t expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Friend, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36440%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skMsgN3YZXd1FZZ0sk4QaA&sysid=1 "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36441%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TO4shFFzviD34mfZATBHPQ&sysid=1 "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c36442%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YFPQdulSrtqFkAZTd6xHnw&sysid=1 "Please click here to
donate now")**

subject: Roe is OVER!

body:
You can kiss the right to privacy goodbye
| | |
---
I’m so damn angry I can hardly type this message to you, friend: The Supreme Court has officially overturned _Roe v. Wade_.
I ain’t gonna lie to you: The Senate is now our LAST line of defense. **If Catherine Cortez Masto loses in Nevada, MAGA extremists will retake the Senate, and you can kiss the RIGHT TO PRIVACY good-bye! They could punish women in every corner of this country – from coast to coast!**
In my expert opinion, Catherine is the most vulnerable Democratic senator in the entire country. That’s why I’m so terrified about Catherine’s race.**** She’s 3 points behind her extreme anti-choice opponent – who’s celebrating this ruling as a “historic victory.” Furthermore, Mitch McConnell and his allies just unleashed another $22 MILLION in attack ads to crush her campaign.
