name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I need Donna back in Congress
body:
Donna fought hard for Prince George’s County, for jobs and investments in her community, to help constituents in need, and to deliver results. As Speaker and then as Leader, I knew I could always count on Donna Edwards as a valued member of our leadership team.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47343291/353959737/1108314527?refcode=em_logo&refcode2=6bdba7f1-dafa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmRiYTdmMS1kYWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7Z-aUG5quvUw9PB8CB9wrefoFpBAEFy7A2v8VHN6kg=)

Peter, When Donna Edwards first represented Maryland’s Fourth Congressional District, and that was for nearly a decade, **she was one of the most effective members in Congress. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47343292/353959738/-1873059460?refcode=em070322_pelosi&refcode2=6bdba7f1-dafa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmRiYTdmMS1kYWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7Z-aUG5quvUw9PB8CB9wrefoFpBAEFy7A2v8VHN6kg=) Donna fought hard for Prince George’s County, for jobs and investments in her community, to help constituents in need, and to deliver results. As Speaker and then as Leader, I knew I could always count on Donna Edwards as a valued member of our leadership team. **We face some uphill battles ahead and we need Donna back in Congress to fight for our progressive values and to deliver for Maryland.** And, as a Maryland native, I’ll be thrilled to see a woman once again as part of the Maryland Congressional Delegation. **[Please, make a donation today to help return Donna to Congress!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47343293/353959739/-1873059460?refcode=em070322_pelosi&refcode2=6bdba7f1-dafa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmRiYTdmMS1kYWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7Z-aUG5quvUw9PB8CB9wrefoFpBAEFy7A2v8VHN6kg=)** | | [CHIP IN $4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47343294/353959740/-1873059460?refcode=em070322_pelosi&&&&amount=4&refcode2=6bdba7f1-dafa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmRiYTdmMS1kYWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7Z-aUG5quvUw9PB8CB9wrefoFpBAEFy7A2v8VHN6kg=)

clean_body: Donna fought hard for Prince George’s County, for jobs and investments in her community, to help constituents in need, and to deliver results. As Speaker and then as Leader, I knew I could always count on Donna Edwards as a valued member of our leadership team. = Peter, When Donna Edwards first represented Maryland’s Fourth Congressional District, and that was for nearly a decade, she was one of the most effective members in Congress. = Donna fought hard for Prince George’s County, for jobs and investments in her community, to help constituents in need, and to deliver results. As Speaker and then as Leader, I knew I could always count on Donna Edwards as a valued member of our leadership team. We face some uphill battles ahead and we need Donna back in Congress to fight for our progressive values and to deliver for Maryland. And, as a Maryland native, I’ll be thrilled to see a woman once again as part of the Maryland Congressional Delegation. = | | = = | = = Thank you, Speaker Nancy Pelosi | Congresswoman Donna Edwards is a proven progressive leader and fighter with the clout and experience to deliver for Maryland’s 4th Congressional District from day one. In Congress, Donna will fight for Medicare for All, environmental justice, and requiring the wealthy to pay their fair share to help reduce prices for all of us. | = Donna Edwards 4 Congress PO Box 442157 Fort Washington, MD 20749 United States

name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: Takes one to know one ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
Doesn't it?
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713482:60rAN0o5N:m:1:3299561967:8455DCF647D10B5CE59C3412F7C1EC92:r)

This is Navy SEAL Morgan Luttrell and I'm in the race for Congress in TX-08.

Truly, I'm not much different than you.

I'm a Pro-Trump, Conservative small business owner from rural Texas.

I get asked a lot: why would you ever want to run for Congress? Why would you put yourself through that?

My answer will always be because TX-08 is my home. I'm a 5th-generation Texan and I have family in _**every county**_ in the district.

I've been at this for a few months and I won't lie to you - **the race has been tough.**

Pelosi wants nothing more than to defeat me and my fellow SEALs. She knows that once we're in Congress, she's done.

Pelosi is pulling out all the stops and throwing everything she's got at my race to **ensure I lose.**

[**So, I 'm humbly asking for your support of just $25, $35 or $50 to help me in this fight for the privilege of serving my home and Freedom-loving patriots.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60713482:60rAN0o5N:m:1:3299561967:8455DCF647D10B5CE59C3412F7C1EC92:r)

name: V. Demings
subject: what this is all about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good
| | |
---
Friend: It's important for me to share my story with you about why I'm running and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
**Back when I was a social worker, I met a young boy who was being seriously neglected at home.** He needed immediate support – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life.

I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him. **That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve my community, to help people like that young boy.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47344425/353963951/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3673-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJjOTA5ZC1kY2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K5O56SX__LXJla6o-MJwD9Zv32rxXqJzH3IkHIjvSMA=)
Fast-forward 27 years: I was Orlando's first woman chief of police and worked tirelessly so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as chief, Mayor Buddy Dyer sat me down for a chat:
**"You have to run for Congress," he told me.**

Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. I even laughed.
But, as I let the idea sink in, I thought about that young boy I helped as a social worker – we were still in touch three decades later. I knew he wasn’t the only one who had to overcome hardship in his childhood: 1 in 7 kids in the U.S. lives in poverty. If I could do something to help kids like him, wouldn’t it be wrong to pass up the opportunity?

That’s when I realized that I needed to run for office to help as many children and working families as I could – so that in the next generation, more children from Florida could grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine. Ever since then, I’ve never stopped fighting toward that goal.
**[I'll never tire of an opportunity to do good and to serve the most vulnerable members of my community, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help send me to the Senate and continue my work of building a better future for our children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47344427/353963952/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3673-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJjOTA5ZC1kY2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K5O56SX__LXJla6o-MJwD9Zv32rxXqJzH3IkHIjvSMA=)**
Not a day goes by that I don't think about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive.
**For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable.**
[**That's the long and short of why I'm in this race, friend. If you're ready to help me build a better future, will you donate to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47344428/353963953/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3673-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJjOTA5ZC1kY2ZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K5O56SX__LXJla6o-MJwD9Zv32rxXqJzH3IkHIjvSMA=)

Thanks for reading my story,

Val Demings

clean_body: I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good | | | Friend: It's important for me to share my story with you about why I'm running and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. Back when I was a social worker, I met a young boy who was being seriously neglected at home. He needed immediate support – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life. I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him. That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve my community, to help people like that young boy. = Fast-forward 27 years: I was Orlando's first woman chief of police and worked tirelessly so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as chief, Mayor Buddy Dyer sat me down for a chat: "You have to run for Congress," he told me. Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. I even laughed. But, as I let the idea sink in, I thought about that young boy I helped as a social worker – we were still in touch three decades later. I knew he wasn’t the only one who had to overcome hardship in his childhood: 1 in 7 kids in the U.S. lives in poverty. If I could do something to help kids like him, wouldn’t it be wrong to pass up the opportunity? That’s when I realized that I needed to run for office to help as many children and working families as I could – so that in the next generation, more children from Florida could grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine. Ever since then, I’ve never stopped fighting toward that goal. = Not a day goes by that I don't think about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive. For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable. = Thanks for reading my story, Val Demings | | = | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. | Peter,

I wanted to send a quick message expressing my gratitude for everything you do.

**Thanks to supporters like you, our movement is as strong as ever. And, we reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!**

I know the world feels heavy right now. But, I am sure of one thing: When we come together and fight hard, we can get big things done. We can defend reproductive rights. We can deliver more affordable healthcare. We can fight right-wing extremism and disinformation to advance civil rights.

But, none of this would be possible without your amazing support. I am incredibly grateful for all that you do. Thank you.

With appreciation,

Valerie

[_**P.S: We really appreciate your action so far. subject: 🚨BREAKING: Liberal judge blocks abortion ban in Florida 🚨

body:
All of our momentum for the pro-life cause could be ground to a halt here in Florida unless we stand strong after a liberal judg
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr31ibhscsih8o2s44f1c9k3le8g09obtq292usg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8tlj65i6apdks4oedcljmgqrapbgeupmbd1j6dieatpj6hjb5c5nmhqjcp3nc3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor1ddkcup70phhmsqr4ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim6o73c1im2ob24no)

---
| | Friend,
---
| **This is an URGENT call to action:**

All of our momentum for the pro-life cause could be _ground to a halt_ here in Florida [**_unless we stand strong_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ftk0miniincjhbcckpd7rra1cnmd03lfum22u8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0pb1c5h2bs) after a liberal judge just ruled in **FAVOR of Planned Parenthood** and **AGAINST Governor Ron DeSantis**!
---
| [DON’T GIVE UP THE FIGHT!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl01g6s3onf6n9ftq10psqjvob2iecbtel4ep8j0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0pb1c5h2bs "DON’T GIVE UP THE FIGHT!")
---
| [DEFEND OUR PRO-LIFE VICTORIES!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgpmfllj8dvugsv0ltk427ls35q4f799lamstvc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0pb1c5h2bs "DEFEND OUR PRO-LIFE VICTORIES!")
---
| Here’s what’s happening...

**FIRST** , Governor DeSantis signed into law a landmark bill here in Florida that BANS abortion after 15 weeks.

**THEN** , the Supreme Court made their historic ruling overturning _Roe v. Wade_ \- a huge decision for protecting the innocent that turned the issue of abortion back to the states.

But **NOW** , a liberal judge has just BLOCKED Governor DeSantis’s pro-life law here in Florida, prolonging what is going to be a _HUGE_ legal fight!

[**_Unless we have the resources at hand to prepare us for this battle and DEFEND our pro-life victories, all of our work to this point could be for nothing._The cruel practice of late-term abortion on-demand is going to continue even in the free state of Florida unless we overcome this radical, activist judge!__**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zus6f6itn7cjdmf8dqfihnndglkjdqf185f63gl0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0pb1c5h2bs)

**So, please, sign this urgent petition ASAP to say we won’t tolerate judicial activism that results in dead babies!**
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION ASAP!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn4bnbpp52j46cbpsbpmhc2h05li4d6no3814s48_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0pb1c5h2bs "SIGN THE PETITION ASAP!")
---
| My time in battle taught me to never give up a fight until the mission is COMPLETE. _Hell, even losing two legs couldn’t stop my mission to protect and serve this country!_

That’s why I know we need to double-down on our efforts to defend life RIGHT NOW - otherwise, we could _LOSE_ this battle here in the state of Florida, and the far-left abortion extremists will _prevail!_

**So, please, rush in reinforcements to help me fight back ASAP before Planned Parenthood wins this battle and brings all of our momentum on this important issue to a __HALT!__**
---
| [CALLING ALL PRO-LIFE PATRIOTS!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4lkpuc27p810fhtlebilvlfbpv72lrcfmqmlvvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0pb1c5h2bs "CALLING ALL PRO-LIFE PATRIOTS!")
---
| [HELP DEFEND OUR VICTORIES IN FL!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsra7j8klcovnq3dbjcae3vkpj8v0b7onkuqvk4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0pb1c5h2bs "HELP DEFEND OUR VICTORIES IN FL!")

name: American Defense News
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zreakls026olkp8p56tlajksd5hgemjqn77dvba0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tr463jmddlgmdpm4p9gs4qn4cb5e3h61dbjmsonaphhedpn4t3hc2pm7crj6moefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3cphmc2qr0pti65j3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4ckfu2pc2ljvtc0567d8kgui6g3e4m64mofqe50_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z19kdcktbtmer8kah1n70b852tn23u54sg52rk0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0ob4c5h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb438b2up41f6gu2m13k9sp1qr32vffom5dvcpao_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpa6fp8m93e5uqvgv9drut6a9isof8shm3453b4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm0ob4c5h2bs)**
---

body:
If we lose this seat, we could lose our Senate majority and any chance we have at codifying Roe.
| | |
---
Hi all, we know it's the weekend, so we'll be quick:

With the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, the stakes of this race got even higher. If we lose this seat, we will lose our Senate majority and Mitch McConnell will move to ban abortion nationwide.

The GOP knows that they need to flip just one seat to take back the Senate majority, and this seat here in New Hampshire is their top target. It's up to us to fight back against their attacks and ensure that we can defend this seat and the Senate majority.

clean_body: If we lose this seat, we could lose our Senate majority and any chance we have at codifying Roe. | | | Hi all, we know it's the weekend, so we'll be quick: With the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, the stakes of this race got even higher. If we lose this seat, we will lose our Senate majority and Mitch McConnell will move to ban abortion nationwide. The GOP knows that they need to flip just one seat to take back the Senate majority, and this seat here in New Hampshire is their top target. It's up to us to fight back against their attacks and ensure that we can defend this seat and the Senate majority. = | | = Thank you, Team Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Avary + Taylor + Graham
subject: Will you help make our mom's day?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi friends – did you get our dad’s email?

| | Hi friends – did you get our dad’s email? We're all so proud to watch our mom Patty run for Congress. In honor of our parents' 40th anniversary today, we'd love to surprise her with a card full of well-wishes from all of you. **[Sign the card here – we know it will make her day!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47347342/353976364/652872050?refcode=em_220703_fromkids&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220703_fromkids&refcode2=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA3MTAwNC1lNWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h068OS_cBo23NrJEP_3ssrVecc1xdiHgFBd1MTFK3SE=&emci=801e7073-54f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091)** Thanks so much,
Avary, Taylor + Graham Pansing Brooks
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47347343/353976365/-124480907?amount=40&refcode=em_220703_fromkids&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220703_fromkids&refcode2=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA3MTAwNC1lNWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h068OS_cBo23NrJEP_3ssrVecc1xdiHgFBd1MTFK3SE=) Hi there! As you might imagine, the last few weeks have been a whirlwind for our family — especially for Patty. That’s why I’m excited that Patty and I get to start this month off with a special celebration: Our 40th wedding anniversary! ❤️ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47347344/353976367/652872050?refcode=em_220703_fromkids&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220703_fromkids&refcode2=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA3MTAwNC1lNWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h068OS_cBo23NrJEP_3ssrVecc1xdiHgFBd1MTFK3SE=&emci=801e7073-54f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091)** Patty is the love of my life, an amazing mother to our children, and the strongest woman I know. Tomorrow, I want to make sure she’s surrounded with love, light, and warm wishes from her favorite people — **which is why I need your help.** Patty loves this team so much, and it would make her day if you signed this surprise card to help us celebrate our 40th anniversary! **[Will you add your name to our card before tomorrow?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47347345/353976368/652872050?refcode=em_220703_fromkids&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220703_fromkids&refcode2=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA3MTAwNC1lNWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h068OS_cBo23NrJEP_3ssrVecc1xdiHgFBd1MTFK3SE=&emci=801e7073-54f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47347346/353976370/652872050?refcode=em_220703_fromkids&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220703_fromkids&refcode2=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA3MTAwNC1lNWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h068OS_cBo23NrJEP_3ssrVecc1xdiHgFBd1MTFK3SE=&emci=801e7073-54f9-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=17998091) After all the hard work Patty has put into her campaign over the last few months, I’m excited we’ll have a family day to celebrate. **[Patty and I are going to do our best to stay offline, but I know that if you’re able to make a contribution to her campaign, it would be greatly appreciated.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47347347/353976372/-124480907?amount=40&refcode=em_220703_fromkids&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220703_fromkids&refcode2=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA3MTAwNC1lNWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h068OS_cBo23NrJEP_3ssrVecc1xdiHgFBd1MTFK3SE=)** | [DONATE $40 FOR 40 YEARS ❤️ »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47347348/353976373/-124480907?amount=40&refcode=em_220703_fromkids&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220703_fromkids&refcode2=fd071004-e5fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA3MTAwNC1lNWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h068OS_cBo23NrJEP_3ssrVecc1xdiHgFBd1MTFK3SE=)

Thank you for helping us celebrate, friend! And thank you for loving Patty (almost!) as fiercely as I do.
All my best,
Loel

clean_body: Hi friends – did you get our dad’s email? | | Hi friends – did you get our dad’s email? We're all so proud to watch our mom Patty run for Congress. In honor of our parents' 40th anniversary today, we'd love to surprise her with a card full of well-wishes from all of you. Thanks so much, Avary, Taylor + Graham Pansing Brooks = Hi there! As you might imagine, the last few weeks have been a whirlwind for our family — especially for Patty. That’s why I’m excited that Patty and I get to start this month off with a special celebration: Our 40th wedding anniversary! ❤️ Patty is the love of my life, an amazing mother to our children, and the strongest woman I know. Tomorrow, I want to make sure she’s surrounded with love, light, and warm wishes from her favorite people — which is why I need your help. Patty loves this team so much, and it would make her day if you signed this surprise card to help us celebrate our 40th anniversary! After all the hard work Patty has put into her campaign over the last few months, I’m excited we’ll have a family day to celebrate. =** | = = Thank you for helping us celebrate, friend! And thank you for loving Patty (almost!) as fiercely as I do. All my best, Loel | | | | | ---|---|---|--- = Emails like this are the best way for us to reach supporters. If you would prefer to receive fewer emails from us, click here to . We’d hate to see you go, but if you would like to stop receiving our emails, you may . name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Talking with voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Hi Peter, Meteorologist and Democratic nominee for Congress in Rep. Cheri Bustos’ seat (IL-17) here. I hope that you’re having a nice morning this holiday weekend. I’m sipping coffee looking at the birds, and loving every minute of it! Between events this week, I was out walking in my neighborhood, reflecting on how we got to this point. I’ve shared many voter stories with you over the course of the campaign:
* Jim, the farmer in Kewanee who didn’t want to sign my petition but after our conversation told me “I think I’ve found a Democrat who makes sense!”
* Betty, the Moline voter who’s expecting me to explain how Congress works, just like I did with the weather.
* The three farmers and lifelong Republicans who told me that they appreciated that I brought a scientific perspective, not a political one. They told me that they trusted me, that they thought I would actually work for them in Washington, and that they would be voting for me.

But the story that sticks out the most to me is Irene, the voter in Peoria, who, at the time of our conversation, hadn’t decided which party’s ballot she was going to pull for the primary election. So I asked her what she was looking for in her next member of Congress, and she said she was so tired of the bickering, she wants someone who’s guided by values and principles, not politics. I completely agree, and told her that that’s why I’m running as the science-guided candidate! We talked about what it meant to actually “represent” our community, and how important it was to work for the public interest. At the end of our conversation, she told me that she now realized how important her vote in our Congressional race was, and said: “I’m so glad you called me, I’m pulling that Democratic ballot so I can vote for YOU!” That’s what this campaign is all about, talking to voters where they’re at. But more than that, these stories are at the heart of who I am: I’m a communicator. I’m guided by science and I love my community here. I’m proud to have earned their trust. And that’s how we’re going to keep IL-17 blue in November. Peter, if this is the kind of leadership you’d like to see in Congress, I’d ask that you chip in today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-july-em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47333824/353924348/-1997116073?refcode=july3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmM2YjgwMC1jNmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HAoXOLJEFoCywmNvEUlL_kDwT1ETY-GYEp5xj8dglx0=) \- Eric \--

name: AOTL Alert
subject: The rise of the far-right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Friend,

We have all witnessed the hateful actions from members of the far-right:
* Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene has referred to the election of Muslim leaders as “an Islamic invasion of our government.”
* Representative Dan Crenshaw was accused of disparaging a female veteran who was sexually assaulted in the Navy.
* Representative Jim Jordan has described the recent gun control legislation as “political theater.”

What do these representatives have in common? They were elected from some of the most gerrymandered districts in the nation. As districts become more gerrymandered, politicians do not have to focus on general elections and only are concerned with their primaries. The evidence is clear: **partisan gerrymandering will only increase political polarization and lead to far-right politicians getting elected.**

[**Can we count on you to donate to help prevent far-right extremists from dominating our government?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47348101/353980505/2060408821?refcode=20220703_AOTL_F_politicalpolarization_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlOTRmODM0LWU5ZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SErSUZgkcP8kTbzi4AtIGEvKt4UG8hvRY6TltteEgTg=)

Our fight continues in Louisiana, Ohio, North Carolina, and many other key states. We need sensible leaders ready to solve the most pressing problems of today, not ultraconservative bigots who carry out heinous actions such as harassing victims of gun violence.

Conservatives across the nation have embraced more and more extreme policy standpoints over the past few years. From support for banning books, to refusing to acknowledge the results of a fair election, to opposing voting rights legislation, these extremists have moved further and further right -- thanks in large part to partisan gerrymandered maps. We will continue to combat these maps and combat the resulting far-right extremism.

[**We need your help. Please make a donation to support our fight against gerrymandered maps.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47348108/353980512/2060408821?refcode=20220703_AOTL_F_politicalpolarization_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlOTRmODM0LWU5ZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SErSUZgkcP8kTbzi4AtIGEvKt4UG8hvRY6TltteEgTg=)

clean_body: | Friend, We have all witnessed the hateful actions from members of the far-right: Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene has referred to the election of Muslim leaders as “an Islamic invasion of our government.” Representative Dan Crenshaw was accused of disparaging a female veteran who was sexually assaulted in the Navy. Representative Jim Jordan has described the recent gun control legislation as “political theater.” What do these representatives have in common? They were elected from some of the most gerrymandered districts in the nation. As districts become more gerrymandered, politicians do not have to focus on general elections and only are concerned with their primaries. The evidence is clear: partisan gerrymandering will only increase political polarization and lead to far-right politicians getting elected. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Our fight continues in Louisiana, Ohio, North Carolina, and many other key states. We need sensible leaders ready to solve the most pressing problems of today, not ultraconservative bigots who carry out heinous actions such as harassing victims of gun violence. Conservatives across the nation have embraced more and more extreme policy standpoints over the past few years. From support for banning books, to refusing to acknowledge the results of a fair election, to opposing voting rights legislation, these extremists have moved further and further right -- thanks in large part to partisan gerrymandered maps. We will continue to combat these maps and combat the resulting far-right extremism. = \--All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228** to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your 2022 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWR_VNmhNr)
_Please see a special message from our sponsor:_
---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418213:WR_VNmhNr:m:1:2532013465:867F0BE4475F3A7F0179D7DB63B7C789:r) Dear Friend of the Constitution,
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.
Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty.
We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.
Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below?
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418213:WR_VNmhNr:m:1:2532013465:867F0BE4475F3A7F0179D7DB63B7C789:r "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment.
There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**.
Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844.
Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment.
As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**."
This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.
This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example...
Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.
Why?
The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body.
Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America.
**But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.**
That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.
And this work continues today.
That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418213:WR_VNmhNr:m:1:2532013465:867F0BE4475F3A7F0179D7DB63B7C789:r)
We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."
Do you agree? I hope so.
This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today.
As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.
Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
It also means your gift really matters.
**Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.**
After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today.
And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you.
This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited!
Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you!
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60418213:WR_VNmhNr:m:1:2532013465:867F0BE4475F3A7F0179D7DB63B7C789:r)
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Joe Biden is a disgrace...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
America wasn't like this when I was president... | Our nation is SUFFERING. Our economy is in the gutter. Inflation is rampant.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ive8mgoccucddv9rqtsfc1ttoaq76qj42qisig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uap32odjclh6fcj1m8q34pjncprb9obhmdomecrlm9hr2o3iespj6tdmcqp65dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhm2qr8ptiehj31cljcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cdge6ob4cpj649fg)
America wasn't like this when I was president... | Our nation is SUFFERING. Our economy is in the gutter. Inflation is rampant.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znnef9jr9qedanq35vmis9qphgequ8dlmof537ko_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)

Friend,

Our nation is _**SUFFERING.**_

Our economy is in the gutter. Inflation is rampant. Gas prices have reached an all-time high. Ships are unable to unload cargo. Families cannot get needed baby formula. We are an embarrassment around the world.

Our withdrawal from Afghanistan was a disaster that cost us precious American blood and gave our enemy $85 billion worth of the best military equipment on earth.

Millions and millions of illegals are marching to the border and invading our country. We have a White House in shambles, with Democrats declaring that Biden is unfit to run for reelection. And what is the Democrat Congress focused on? A **Kangaroo Court** , hoping to distract the American people from the great pain they are experiencing.

I'll never stop working to SAVE AMERICA, but I can't do it alone. I need my BEST supporters to step up and DEFEND our Country. I've always been able to count on you, Friend. Can I still?

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT and STAND WITH ME against the radical Left trying to DESTROY America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5dqsgm1gd3oc7rg881ak6q4l1anbd2l45tdqaf8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcm1sbf20ffb80ao53jennst5huqocqf9e95sce8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $1750 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsmrkv813pvgvbnu8j747nasp2gru0rgpsv33r4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $700 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsg4eaq2vfnr62mp6t1boruot69lb2gaadl3v7j0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $350 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1qd0j53sugtri900a9b50ko2ean3qecsq1l40l0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $25 = $175 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhdqt4p1imskl573vhm940sn1g1kbuedvd1b73tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8t9sml4iah0ab0so3tos0c6tefo6kcgsa6p1vl0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)

Seventeen months after the events of January 6th, Democrats are unable to offer solutions. They are desperate to change the narrative of a failing Nation without even making mention of the havoc and death caused by the Radical Left just months earlier.

Make no mistake, they control the government. _**They own this disaster**_. They are hoping that these hearings will somehow alter their failing prospects.

A certain Democrat once said, "It's the economy, stupid." Well, Democrats now seem to think that Americans are "stupid." They are not. America is crumbling, and Democrats have no solutions.

Our nation has no hope of change for the better under Democratic leadership. People are desperate. Rather than solving problems, Democrats are rehashing history in hopes of changing the narrative. **During my time in office, our nation was thriving, our economy was strong, and the price of gas was very low.**

Above all else, we were respected, perhaps like never before. America prospered under the Trump Administration. Together, I know that we can SAVE AMERICA. I will never stop fighting, but I need you by my side NOW more than ever before.

**[Please contribute $25 or more IMMEDIATELY to get your name on the donor list that I'll review later.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r2mk0h527jmqtb8cj286uchja3duh7o1b555q8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z80liqo0ti5irdjsksbtq3odl6dmubhlatg3gjuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)
Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6urlgtnunkht78frdc3hm4t8dtpdsi17vphjjb8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3hm2p36cph2bs)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Holy smokes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47349279/353985710/2038802527?refcode=20220703_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjNTQ2Ny1lZGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4fGwVX-1Zq9C4zUNZ2MHzqJvfjqz7N7rP8YjWgGdAVM=) Holy freakin’ smokes, folks — I am absolutely blown away by the response I’ve received since becoming the official Democratic nominee for Ohio’s open Senate seat. [**We only need 980 more grassroots supporters to split a donation between us and Serve America to hit our General Election Founding Donor goal. Will you step up and be one of our founding donors to flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47349280/353985711/2038802527?refcode=20220703_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjNTQ2Ny1lZGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4fGwVX-1Zq9C4zUNZ2MHzqJvfjqz7N7rP8YjWgGdAVM=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47349281/353985712/-2057546413?refcode=20220703_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNjNTQ2Ny1lZGZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4fGwVX-1Zq9C4zUNZ2MHzqJvfjqz7N7rP8YjWgGdAVM=)
My millionaire right-wing opponent JD Vance is the worst of the worst. He has the full support of Donald Trump and the MAGA base, and instead of grassroots support, his campaign has been repeatedly bailed out by uber-wealthy GOP donors and Peter Thiel’s $13.5 million super PAC. **JD Vance doesn’t represent Ohio or the working class.** In fact, he skipped town and moved to San Francisco to become a celebrity and invest in companies that profit from globalization and free trade. And then he had the audacity to call America “a joke” — you’ve got to be kidding me. As if that weren’t enough — JD Vance celebrated the leaked SCOTUS vote to overturn Roe, calling it an “amazing victory.” We can’t let him anywhere near the U.S. Senate if we want to protect reproductive rights. To take down Vance and all of his billionaire buddies, we’re going to need your grassroots support from now until November, folks. He has the full support of Donald Trump and the MAGA base, and instead of grassroots support, his campaign has been repeatedly bailed out by uber-wealthy GOP donors and Peter Thiel’s $13.5 million super PAC. JD Vance doesn’t represent Ohio or the working class. In fact, he skipped town and moved to San Francisco to become a celebrity and invest in companies that profit from globalization and free trade. And then he had the audacity to call America “a joke” — you’ve got to be kidding me. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Thank you! and Quick Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Hey, everyone! I hope you are having a great Fourth of July weekend! I wanted to reach out and share three updates:
1. **First, thanks to this incredible grassroots team, we raised thousands of dollars for the Planned Parenthood Action Fund and Pro Choice Oregon!** Two organizations that are working day in and day out to respond to the Supreme Court's unconscionable ruling overturning _Roe v. Wade_. This fall, abortion access is on the ballot, and these groups are electing fighters for reproductive freedom up and down the ballot, so your support makes a big difference. Thank you!

2. **Second, we hit our June fundraising goal!** Now that we’re fully into the general election, these goals are incredibly important, and you really stepped up. We’re running against two conservative, out-of-touch candidates who are raking in giant checks to defeat our movement, so grassroots donations have been especially critical in our fight. Thank you!

3. **Finally, we just launched our online store!** You can let your friends and neighbors know you’re on #TeamTina by ordering a yard sign, bumper sticker (or a bumper magnet!), campaign buttons, or apparel — and all of the proceeds go towards helping us win. [**Support the campaign in style and check out our brand-new merchandise here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47350659/353987633/1831987551?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20220703_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzhlMTI5NS1mMWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g5CAEfrnDVuQ9WxZBO-oXQFyWyLSEtu3NjkTrlVGbV8=&emci=88ac6052-52fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e78e1295-f1fa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)

Together, I know that we will build a future of justice and opportunity for every Oregonian.
Yours in the fight,
Tina

name: Gov. Jared Polis
subject: This community’s general election endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLIS FOR COLORADO
body:
National Republicans are convinced that this is their year to flip Colorado red.

Team — We’re officially in the General Election now in Colorado, and we’re up against a GOP opponent who wants to undo all the progress we’ve made together. Team Oz Dr. Mehmet Oz is a Trump-endorsed, America First Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you. to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania’s next Senator. | Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate If you would like to donate by mail, Our mailing address is: Doctor Oz For Senate PO Box 576 Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006

name: Wade Herring
subject: America's Promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0704 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0704]
Peter,
On our country’s 246th birthday, it is important to reflect upon America’s history, how the past has led to our present, and what lies ahead in our future.
As a nation, we have accomplished so many incredible things built on the premise of liberty and justice for all.
Throughout America’s history, true patriots have fought endlessly to expand freedom to those who once did not have it – workers, people of color, women. But in 2022, we still have work to do to make sure all Americans are truly free.
Next year in Washington, I will fight to ensure every American enjoys the freedom they deserve. The only way that we can overcome our missteps in foundational equality is to recognize the fundamental rights of each citizen, each neighbor, and each child to access all of the rights, protections, and opportunities that this great nation has to offer.
This Independence Day, I am proud to be an American. I am proud to be a small part of the centuries-long fight for universal freedom in our country. And most importantly, I am proud to stand united with you as we embark on this journey to fight for better representation for Georgia’s First District up in Washington.
I hope you have a safe & happy Fourth of July and enjoy the holiday weekend with friends and family!
Onwards,
Wade Herring

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Will you make your first $3 donation?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It’s going to take an even bigger effort this time around to hold this seat.
#

Friends —
$3
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today to help re-elect Mark Kelly this November.
During our first campaign, hundreds of thousands of people donated to help flip this seat without a DIME of corporate PAC money. It’s something we’re very proud of.
But it’s a different race this time around. If Democrats lose even one seat, we could wake up one day with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
And Trump knows this too. That’s why he endorsed a GOP extremist, Blake Masters, who supports a national abortion ban to take on Mark.
So, flipping Arizona — a seat we won by only 2.4 points in 2020 — is clearly one of Trump and McConnell’s top priorities right now.
Mark has already faced millions of dollars in attack ads, and we know that this is only the beginning. It’s going to take an even bigger effort this time around to hold this seat. So, we’re asking:
[**Can you please make your first $3 donation to help Mark hold this seat? We have to be ready for whatever comes next.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july22.t8IncZ&refcode=em220703-1-7&t=1&akid=3214%2E6688874%2EH7QPGM)

body:

Hi Peter,
As you celebrate this weekend, I just wanted to take a moment and thank you for your support of our campaign. Knowing you're in my corner motivates me every day.

I am encouraged by my conversations with voters on their porches and at farmer's markets, and I look forward to the coming months to continue to show why I'm the best candidate for the Second District. If you'd like to help spread the word, we have volunteer opportunities [https://joyfoxcongress.com/volunteer-for-joy-fox-for-congress/] to knock on doors or make calls.

Have a safe and happy 4th of July,

Joy

| Peter, Our campaign’s LAST public filing deadline is less than 12 hours away, and I'm starting to get a little worried we might not reach our goal in time. But what does this deadline mean? At 11:59PM, we are legally required to close the books and turn in our numbers so everyone — yes everyone — can see. From reporters, to our opponents, to 23% of likely Democratic voters who are still undecided, everyone will be looking at how much we raise as a sign of our campaign strength heading into the final 2 weeks. **Right now the polls are showing me as one of the top 3 candidates in this race, so reaching those undecided voters is absolutely crucial to pushing our campaign into the lead.** We set an ambitious goal to bring in another 250 online donations before midnight (at least 15 from 20910), but there’s a reason for that: I’m running as a bold progressive, so this campaign can’t shy away from bold goals and ideas. clean_body: Our campaign’s LAST public filing deadline is less than 12 hours away, and I'm starting to get a little worried we might not reach our goal in time. | = | Peter, Our campaign’s LAST public filing deadline is less than 12 hours away, and I'm starting to get a little worried we might not reach our goal in time. But what does this deadline mean? At 11:59PM, we are legally required to close the books and turn in our numbers so everyone — yes everyone — can see. From reporters, to our opponents, to 23% of likely Democratic voters who are still undecided, everyone will be looking at how much we raise as a sign of our campaign strength heading into the final 2 weeks. Right now the polls are showing me as one of the top 3 candidates in this race, so reaching those undecided voters is absolutely crucial to pushing our campaign into the lead. We set an ambitious goal to bring in another 250 online donations before midnight (at least 15 from 20910), but there’s a reason for that: I’m running as a bold progressive, so this campaign can’t shy away from bold goals and ideas. = | = Before time runs out, we need to show that our campaign has what it takes to win this fight and bring real change to Maryland. = Every dollar we raise from supporters like you gets us that much closer to our goal, Peter. If you are able, please give whatever you can to help us make it in time. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = This is the most important deadline our campaign has ever faced. But with your help, I know that we can reach our goal in time. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: One of the most controversial things I’ve ever said
body:
Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6118%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=YB3K8SNc0yhmp4KjsRrwkA&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63270%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cMFgQN1pJSdXmel%2fG62iBw&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63270%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cMFgQN1pJSdXmel%2fG62iBw&sysid=1)
---
Hello,

Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government.

That simply isn’t true, and I can prove it. In my brand-new coffee-table style book, _America Is a Christian Natio_ n, you can see how our country has moved from its reliance on God to its rejection of God. It’s a short read, and we’ve paired the written content with some gorgeous patriotic photos that you’re going to enjoy looking through.

---
| | [LEARN THE TRUTH](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63271%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fpmDI%2fyheYj5vREmmZHlpQ&sysid=1)
---
I would love for you to read through _America Is a Christian Nation_ so that you can understand how our country has moved from its reliance on God to its rejection of God. It’s a short read, and we’ve paired the written content with some gorgeous patriotic photos that you’re going to enjoy looking through.
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63270%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cMFgQN1pJSdXmel%2fG62iBw&sysid=1)
---
In appreciation for any gift you are able to make to _Pathway to Victory_ today, we’d like to send you a copy of this book along with a DVD copy of my message, _America is a Christian Nation_. **And thanks to our $500,000 Gospel Advance matching challenge, any donation you make will be doubled** to help _Pathway to Victory_ reach twice as many listeners and viewers across the country. That means that twice as many people will hear one of the most controversial things I’ve ever said: that **America was founded as a Christian nation!**

You only have until midnight on July 4th to take advantage of this incredible matching gift opportunity, so make sure you visit this link today: **[https://ptv.org/donate/july-2022-america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63272%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ov4NAnOFlBjt5A3cSU1KBg&sysid=1)**
---
[DOUBLE MY IMPACT](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63273%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bIag1sQLulzaZ7LI%2fnH75Q&sysid=1)
---
You may already be convinced that America was founded as a Christian nation and that we have strayed far from that foundation. The question in that case is, how do we get back? You’ll find the answer to that question as well at the end of _America Is a Christian Nation_.

As believers, we need to do all we can to both preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. I hope you’ll stand with me in doing so, and make double the impact at the same time.

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6118%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=YB3K8SNc0yhmp4KjsRrwkA&sysid=1)_

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: My daughter is now less free than I was at her age.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
My daughter, the fourth Margaret in my family, is now less free than I was at her age.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47360107/353997947/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1244-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzEwM2NhNy1mYWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=scgtgiHTA3HqzdtTwOotHJPpAVQ6GAZvQkoigkvizpI=)
I am the third in a line of four women named Margaret. My grandmother, Margaret Cooke Byers, was born in 1897 and turned 22 on the day that Congress passed the 19th Amendment, which allowed women to vote. My mother, Peggy Byers Wood, saw women achieve the right to control their own bodies, finances, and futures with the Roe decision. I am the third Margaret, and I became the second woman in the history of America to be elected both Governor and Senator.
Over the course of my grandmother's, my mother's, and my lifetime, women have made tremendous progress toward achieving their rights as full and equal citizens in our democracy.
But now, for the first time in our country's history, a generation of American women have fewer rights than their mothers did.
**My daughter, the fourth Margaret in my family, is now less free than I was at her age.**
This is a grave moment for American women and for our democracy. The Supreme Court has taken away the freedom of half the population, freedom that most American women have known for their entire lives.
It seems daunting to contemplate where we go from here. But we have been in similar fights before. We have to keep fighting. We have to organize, mobilize, vote, and do everything in our power to protect our Senate majority – because if Mitch McConnell becomes the Majority Leader, he could ban abortion nationwide.
We owe it to ourselves and the next generation — to women like my daughter, Margaret number four — to keep fighting.
So please, join me in this fight by rushing **[$3 or any amount you can to continue the progress we've been working on for hundreds of years.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47360108/353997948/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1244-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzEwM2NhNy1mYWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=scgtgiHTA3HqzdtTwOotHJPpAVQ6GAZvQkoigkvizpI=)**

clean_body: My daughter, the fourth Margaret in my family, is now less free than I was at her age. | | | = I am the third in a line of four women named Margaret. My grandmother, Margaret Cooke Byers, was born in 1897 and turned 22 on the day that Congress passed the 19th Amendment, which allowed women to vote. My mother, Peggy Byers Wood, saw women achieve the right to control their own bodies, finances, and futures with the Roe decision. I am the third Margaret, and I became the second woman in the history of America to be elected both Governor and Senator. Over the course of my grandmother's, my mother's, and my lifetime, women have made tremendous progress toward achieving their rights as full and equal citizens in our democracy. But now, for the first time in our country's history, a generation of American women have fewer rights than their mothers did. My daughter, the fourth Margaret in my family, is now less free than I was at her age. This is a grave moment for American women and for our democracy. The Supreme Court has taken away the freedom of half the population, freedom that most American women have known for their entire lives. It seems daunting to contemplate where we go from here. But we have been in similar fights before. We have to keep fighting. We have to organize, mobilize, vote, and do everything in our power to protect our Senate majority – because if Mitch McConnell becomes the Majority Leader, he could ban abortion nationwide. We owe it to ourselves and the next generation — to women like my daughter, Margaret number four — to keep fighting. So please, join me in this fight by rushing = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. name: Ian Silverii
subject: Emailing for my wife Brittany
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Team, this is Ian, Brittany’s husband. I’m sure you get a LOT of emails from campaigns asking for your support, but I wanted to take a moment to explain why supporting this campaign — right here, right now — is so important.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47360230/353998435/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGUzYzdjOS1mYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bB_xNx0IuCfH0F_WbwNS4rw88N5_9eSOH5gxINMOk60=&emci=0cea328f-a1f1-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e4e3c7c9-fbfa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=19954364) Team, this is Ian, Brittany’s husband. I’m sure you get a LOT of emails from campaigns asking for your support, but I wanted to take a moment to explain why supporting this campaign — right here, right now — is so important. It’s not just because Republicans are spending millions to try to flip this district. And it’s not just because this seat absolutely could determine which party controls Congress — and thus decide the fate of everything from voting rights to the right to choose, to whether our LGBTQ+ friends, neighbors, and family members have the same rights as we do. **I’m asking for your support because I’m absolutely certain we need more people like Brittany in Congress. So let me tell you a bit about her:** When I first met Brittany, she was standing in subfreezing temperatures on a sidewalk, waving down strangers to raise money for a nonprofit she believed in. It was love at first sight. Since then, I’ve seen Brittany fight for regular people with everything she’s got in the State House and Senate— working well into the night (okay that part wasn’t always great) to pass laws to help our schools, reduce health care costs, and protect Coloradans’ civil rights. I’ve seen her face down some of the nastiest GOP attacks I’ve ever seen, just ignoring horrible stuff that made my blood boil — and win one tough election after another. I’ve seen her in action as the very best mom our two-year-old son Davis could ask for — and I know a big part of what drives her is making our country a fairer, more just, and more equal place for him and the next generation of Americans. Our family is going to give up a lot if the voters send Brittany to Congress, but we’re willing to because we know what it means to have her fighting for us. Everyone deserves to have a fighter like Brittany in their corner, and we’re already so proud of everything she’s done in this campaign so far. [**Team, Brittany officially has a right-wing GOP opponent in this race. And she needs your support more than ever if she’s going to fight off the coming millions of dollars worth of attack ads — and win this seat in Congress. Will you pitch in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47360231/353998436/-1703193327?refcode=email_062522_Emailingformywife&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGUzYzdjOS1mYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bB_xNx0IuCfH0F_WbwNS4rw88N5_9eSOH5gxINMOk60=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47360232/353998437/-1703193327?refcode=eemail_062522_Emailingformywife&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGUzYzdjOS1mYmZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bB_xNx0IuCfH0F_WbwNS4rw88N5_9eSOH5gxINMOk60=)

Thank you for everything you’re doing to support this campaign and move our country forward.
-Ian

subject: Celebrating Independence Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terrie Wood 2022 -- Robert F
body:
| | | _[View this email in your browser](https://us13.campaign-archive.com/?e=cd99aa018d&u=31c0ff16f808b2d717581f4dc&id=1148d46365)_
---
| | [ ](https://terriewood.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31c0ff16f808b2d717581f4dc&id=6b1eb0f1ea&e=cd99aa018d)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

Let me be among the first to wish you a **Happy Independence Day**!

Today we celebrate the things that make us uniquely American: our founding principles and our freedoms.

As we share time with our friends and families this weekend, take a peek at my latest video in which I talk a little about how my husband and I honor our country today and everyday.

---
| [ ](https://terriewood.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31c0ff16f808b2d717581f4dc&id=626c2284b1&e=cd99aa018d)
---
| There's something so special about our country - and in order to preserve our freedoms, we must vote.

We must select Republican candidates who can and will win in November.

I am the only candidate for Secretary of the State who can institute policy and procedures that our founding fathers can be proud of. I am the only candidate in the Republican primary with a proven record of winning elections.

Wishing you a joyous and safe weekend and I look forward to meeting you soon on the campaign trail!

Warmest regards,
Terrie
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Let me be among the first to wish you a Happy Independence Day! Today we celebrate the things that make us uniquely American: our founding principles and our freedoms. As we share time with our friends and families this weekend, take a peek at my latest video in which I talk a little about how my husband and I honor our country today and everyday. | | There's something so special about our country - and in order to preserve our freedoms, we must vote. We must select Republican candidates who can and will win in November. I am the only candidate for Secretary of the State who can institute policy and procedures that our founding fathers can be proud of. I am the only candidate in the Republican primary with a proven record of winning elections. Wishing you a joyous and safe weekend and I look forward to meeting you soon on the campaign trail! Warmest regards, Terrie | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:terriewood@gmail.com | | Copyright © 2022 Terrie Wood, All rights reserved.

name: Trudy Busch Valentine
subject: I love this photo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
Yes, that's me, beaming in my nurse costume.
| | |
---
Peter – I've always wanted to be a nurse. Yes, that's me, beaming in my nurse costume with my mother at my side.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47361004/354002105/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk80-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGY1MGQwZC0wM2ZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uFHqb2YR8BOImsKwmbX3WF2R3uDWX55kUyboTaLgf4Q=)
**I have always known who I wanted to be: a servant to others.** I grew up knowing that “to whom much is given, much is expected.”
That's what inspired me to go to nursing school, to care for my patients, to help children who have all the odds stacked against them, and to use my good fortune to make the world a better place than how I found it.
I'm proud to say that my life has been a life of service – as a nurse, volunteer, advocate, mom, and neighbor. And now I am ready to serve as your U.S. Senator.
As a Senator, I'll work my heart out to make life better for American families. I'll push for legislation to protect our reproductive freedoms, defend ballot access, expand protections for our unions, curb gun violence, and end the opioid epidemic. **When others lead with division, greed, and partisanship, I'll choose honesty, integrity, and compassion _every single time._**
**There are plenty of lawyers in Washington, Peter. The Senate could sure use a nurse for a change.[So please, will you chip in a grassroots donation so that I can serve this country as the first nurse ever elected to the Senate? I'll only have the support I need to win on Election Day if we build a powerful grassroots movement right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47361005/354002106/-1746441832?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk80-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGY1MGQwZC0wM2ZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uFHqb2YR8BOImsKwmbX3WF2R3uDWX55kUyboTaLgf4Q=)**

name: Chief Val Demings
subject: reaching out to set the record straight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
while I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician
| | |
---
Friend, Marco Rubio is attacking my 27 years of law enforcement service, so I'm reaching out to set the record straight.

Back in 1983, **I answered a call to serve because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm.** And while I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician.

But the problem is that some voters have only heard Marco Rubio's lies about me, and I need more resources to share my story of service with more Floridians before it's too late. Please understand, friend: How quickly I'm able to correct the record for voters will make or break this election.

**[If you can spare $5, will you donate before midnight to help me counter Rubio's attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47360932/354001751/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3707-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTY5NGQ1OC0wMmZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kf2gbIOTNRBQ587mmXHqjHoO2rEjh3MRFxkfpBB5wdc=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47360933/354001752/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3707-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTY5NGQ1OC0wMmZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kf2gbIOTNRBQ587mmXHqjHoO2rEjh3MRFxkfpBB5wdc=)
I was one of eight women in a class of 30 when I joined the police academy – but I always remembered what my mom had told me: "Be the best you can be, even if people say you don't belong."
And when it came time to choose a class president, one of the other women in our class convinced me to run. I was nervous, but I went for it – and I won by a landslide.
**I graduated not only as class president, but at the top of my class.** When I got out of the academy, I went straight to work protecting and serving my community. And after decades of service, **I became the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.**
Fast forward to today: I'm about to take on my biggest challenge yet. There are obstacles ahead, but with my "never tire" attitude and a massive grassroots movement behind me, I know that I can become Florida's next U.S. senator and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

**I'm no stranger to adversity, friend. If naysayers like Rubio think their attacks will make me feel defeated, they've got another thing coming. I've heard it all before – and I've only come out stronger.**
Thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Chief Val Demings
