name: Dale Sutherland, Code 3
subject: Sign the Note of Support for our officers in need
body:
I don’t want to downplay anyone else’s job...but I’d argue law enforcement officers have one of the toughest jobs in Ameri
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd8mkv0ck04iln295ilbt15b1k0q802ldd6c7am0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ueqrct5lmmo69pb6c1o74o766kpr6shgs6qrec3lc3ir4otgchr66sb5m9p7co37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shmcor65ddicurm8phgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cdgeeob0s5i649fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zca8he2j1pj6lv27lrsqb8q3pd4cpufd2gtkrutg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh2bs)
---
Friend I think you and I would agree on this... **It’s hard to be a cop these days. ** I don’t want to downplay anyone else’s job...but I’d argue law enforcement officers have one of the _toughest jobs in America_ right now. Whether it’s anti-cop activists, prosecutors or politicians...Hardened criminals who’ve been emboldened by anti-cop sentiment...or the small fraction of bad cops that give the vast majority of good cops a bad rap... It makes an already tough job even tougher... _And that_ ’ _s not to mention if you do your job honorably and are permanently injured – or worse – in the line of duty,**that you and your family may not even have the benefits to take care of your medical needs and basic essentials.**_ That’s why I’m writing you today... [**Because if you** ’**re someone who says they** “**Back the Blue” and believes it** ’**s more than just a slogan, I hope you** ’**ll sign a NOTE OF SUPPORT to thank the injured law enforcement officers my nonprofit organization – Code 3 – helps with life after service. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfgkp96fm91lra461np8kkfd5fhaml5nkd4us3r0_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh2bs)
---
[**Send Your Note Of Support To Injured Law Enforcement Officers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zklssno9qemlphi9co8743q63mpn7a40ctvvk420_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh2bs)
---
Allow me to introduce myself... My name is **Dale Sutherland**. For 28 years of my life, I proudly served as a police officer and detective in the Washington, D.C. area. I’ve been a uniform on patrol. I’ve been undercover. I’ve busted drug dealers and ruthless killers. So, I can tell you from experience unless someone’s walked a mile in a police officer’s shoes, they have no idea what it’s like... The split-second decisions that mean life or death...the impossible choices that will forever change people’s lives...the chance you may be punished for your actions – even if you did everything by the book... Only a special few will really know the **_burden of the job._** But I know the brave men and women who wear the badge do it anyways – because they were called to protect and serve... To help their communities, their neighbors and their families – and above all - to keep them safe. But while every officer prays they have a long, peaceful and uneventful career... **_It can all change in an instant - without warning._** It’s something I learned the hard way... In one instance, I was trying to bust a gang of homicidal drug dealers. Through an informant, I began undercover work to infiltrate this gang and build a case for arrests. One night, I was running late for an exchange. In my absence, the informant approached a car with the dealers inside, only to be shot and killed. As a man of faith, I spoke a lot about the Lord to this informant. I hope it was enough, because his loss still weighs on me to this day. The reality is it could have been me who was killed that day. I was lucky to finish my career as a law enforcement officer relatively unscathed when I retired. But not all officers are so lucky... Some tragically lose their lives in the line of duty. Many others are permanently injured from the wounds they receive. **Worse yet, many permanently injured officers suffer a brutal betrayal when the very system that promised to look after them refuses to cover their basic medical, quality-of-life and financial needs. ** _It’s a sad state of affairs when our country doesn’t do enough to help our injured or fallen heroes..._ But believe it or not, it happens. And while the system needs to change, I simply can’t wait around for it – because there are hundreds of injured law enforcement officers around the country who need our help today. That’s why I founded Code 3 and our Injured Officer Initiative - an effort to support permanently injured law enforcement officers with a higher standard of care... [**So if you can please take a few moments to write a brief NOTE OF SUPPORT to these brave heroes, I** ’**d greatly appreciate it. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ivceeeqtimmhjpjerjr6r1vc9cp867pkcrv5ko_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh2bs)
---
[**Send Your Note Of Support To Injured Law Enforcement Officers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zst1fju7vmpicu0gka18ir3hjs3pl4t6do2l25q8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh2bs)
---
With the support of good folks like you, we’ve been able to help several officers with the hardships they face after their service. Officers like former Detective Lani Pinkney, who served with the Washington D.C. Metropolitan Police... In 1995, Detective Pinkney was shot in the line of a duty, leaving her paralyzed for life. She was pregnant with her third child at the time, who miraculously survived. She was unable to return to work, and in the over 20 years that followed, it’s been a struggle for her to make ends meet, let alone have her medical needs taken care of. **_Once, a simple request to have a broken wheel on her wheelchair was denied – which eventually led to Lani falling out of the chair and shattering her femur. _** Another officer, Lt. Will Rogers – a sheriffs’ deputy in Berkeley County, South Carolina – had a similar story when he was ambushed in 2015. Lt. Rogers was shot multiple times in the arm and head, and then ran over by a car outside of a gas station while on duty. Following this incident, he was forced to retire. He undergoes physical therapy every day and suffers from seizures and migraines. _Yet, he received no help from his department. He lost all medical benefits. And he even had a Social Security Disability application denied!_ **Friend does this sound like the way our injured officers – _these heroes who put their lives on the lines to keep our communities safe_ – should have to live? ** I don’t think so. That’s why Code 3 stepped in to help both of these heroic officers when the system failed them... For Detective Pinkney, that meant a financial hardship grant to help her make ends meet... For Lt. Rogers, that meant helping cover the cost of in-home health care assistance... And there are many more just like them who desperately need help... **_But it_ ’ _s only possible with good people like you who_ ’ _ll step up to the plate for these heroes when our system won_ ’ _t._** However, I’m not asking you to make a gift right now. What I am asking for is for you to simply write a brief note to officers to let them know how grateful you are for their sacrifice in the line of duty... [**Will you please consider writing a brief NOTE OF SUPPORT to the permanently injured law enforcement officers Code 3 helps?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqpqfaakn2sjh25p0tef5n8i1ar4vf4o0afr3irg_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh2bs)
---
[**Send Your Note Of Support To Injured Law Enforcement Officers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6r4f3ufljiei7dioicacjs3fga8m8ae4tmhuu6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh2bs)
---
If you feel compelled to support Code 3 in our mission to help these officers, I left a link at the bottom where you can make a tax-deductible gift. And if you do so, I want you to know that you’ll be making a huge difference in easing the pain and stress that these officers have faced every day since their injuries... What’s more, you’ll be giving their families some much-needed peace of mind... But at the very least, if you believe we should “Back the Blue,” then I hope you’ll sign your note today to let these brave heroes know you have their backs. I know they’ll appreciate hearing from good folks like you. **God Bless, **
---
**Dale Sutherland** **President & Founder** **Code 3**
---
[**Send Your Note Of Support To Injured Law Enforcement Officers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq9uq53rt5ta08ooot56mj4qh9gbcilhk3p0ruuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh2bs)
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zv2k8p90nmtbkv3qr0fi8p6fhvbdhu05q4rsbtgg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf7de3h41tvkn43odtsat4c3npe9ojmu8r2gdg00_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3jm2o71chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
Disney has offered to pay for employees to travel to get abortions following today's Supreme Court ruling | | | | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=29a0596760&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| | _**BREAKING: Disney says it will pay for employees to travel to get abortions after Roe v. Wade decision**_ Friend,

Today is a great day for America. The Supreme Court announced it has overturned Roe vs. Wade, which had banned states from making their own abortion laws.

Roe v. Wade was a mistake from the beginning that has led to the death of millions of unborn children over the past 50 years.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ][IMG]

April 26, 2021

Do you remember, folks? That’s the day we launched this
whirlwind campaign for Ohio’s open Senate seat.

Over the past year, we’ve built an incredible movement together—meeting
with folks in all of Ohio’s 88 counties, securing the Democratic
nomination for Senate, and countering the far right’s BS lies. I’m proud
of what we’ve accomplished so far and hopeful for the fight ahead.

154,717

That’s the number of folks who have chipped in their hard-earned dollars
to this campaign. Without your donations, we wouldn’t stand a chance
against JD Vance’s billionaire backers and the GOP’s dark-money machine.

This is exactly the kind of grassroots power it will take to win this
neck-and-neck race, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you in my
corner.

$5

That’s the amount I’m asking you to chip in today—because it’s not about
how much you give, but how many people we have on the team.

There’s power in numbers, and I’ll take thousands of
hardworking folks chipping in what they can, when they can over a blank
check from some corporate billionaire any day.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15870?t=1009&amount=5&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ]So, I’m humbly asking: will you please make a $5 contribution to our
campaign right now? We have a major fundraising goal this month, and we
can’t afford to come up short. Trust me, I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t
important.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15870?t=1010&amount=5&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ]Donate $5 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15870?t=1011&amount=10&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ]Donate $10
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15870?t=1012&amount=25&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15870?t=1013&amount=50&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15870?t=1014&amount=100&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15870?t=1015&amount=30&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ]Other Amount

November 8, 2022

That will be the day that we flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic
Senate majority—but only if we’re all in this together.

Thank you,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16073?t=1007&akid=4422%2E3611125%2EmCMhu3 ]Tim Ryan

name: Abrams for Georgia
subject: Derek, this race is now tied
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

We just got back the latest polling of Georgia voters,
Derek — and there’s big news:

Stacey Abrams: 48%
Brian Kemp: 48%
(Quinnipiac, 6.29.22)

Despite the odds against us between Kemp flooding the airwaves with
negative ads and him having an unfair fundraising advantage — this race is
TIED. It’s clear that Stacey’s positive vision for One Georgia is
connecting with voters, but with a race this close, we can’t afford to
slow down now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220703_B1_Poll_S1_T1_AFG_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=844%2E1862389%2EJKqytu ]Can we count on you to donate $5 now? With less than
five months until Election Day, we’re relying on grassroots
supporters to keep
our momentum going.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220703_B1_Poll_S1_T1_AFG_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1006&akid=844%2E1862389%2EJKqytu ]DONATE $5

Derek, the
fact that we’ve closed our polling gap with Kemp is proof that our
grassroots team has the momentum. But if we learned anything from 2020 and
2021, it’s that Georgia elections can come down to the slightest margins —
so we can’t stop fighting for every last vote.

We know that Brian Kemp isn’t afraid to rig the rules to his advantage —
and that he’s willing to spend “whatever it takes” to win.

That’s why Stacey is building the most robust grassroots team in Georgia
history. We’re going to every corner of the state to lift up every voter
who Brian Kemp has left behind. Our strategy is working, but we can’t let
up now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220703_B1_Poll_S1_T1_AFG_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1007&akid=844%2E1862389%2EJKqytu ]If you can, make your
first
$5 donation now to make sure we can take on Brian Kemp.
Really, any amount will make a major difference.

Thank you,

Abrams for Georgia

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=844%2E1862389%2EJKqytu ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=844%2E1862389%2EJKqytu

name: Ryan D. Kelley
subject: Why Didn't I Get the Right to Life Endorsement?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D
body:
That's a very good question.
| | | |
---
---
|
Peter,
You might be puzzled by the fact that I did not receive the Right to Life endorsement.
Although RTL has not explained why it chose to endorse this particular candidate, I know that I am 100% pro-life and as governor, I will continue to fight for the rights of the unborn, with everything I have!
Last year, my wife became pregnant.
Some thought that it was the worst time for a new pregnancy. We already had 5 kids, and I already spent long hours on the campaign trail.
However, we welcomed this new life, and every new life, because it is a gift from God.
In March of this year, little Tommy was born!
My wife and I have 6 kids now, and we're just getting started!
When I am governor, I promise that I will fight to remove the scourge of abortion from the State of Michigan.
Please keep our campaign and family in your prayers, and enjoy these awesome pictures of our family!
---
| [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NsUlASA6nopoBaicXB45PqUqQj97wkeQbSjOVZ72qg2vd5DEAv5k6aNuFL2tT2vK8KWPIDY8G0HMM_HtUHrmv4hnz1nLxxh45pAu7g0cb3XEyJBw2lb6I6BcoRZnjT1HyyoUnHz1buHN2SSnEJviIHtp1hHAraCHTY5lGx4AXvbmioUiLHUf8dpdCNLveYrgI6PakNmPBUaJ4-sigp0GF_j8tgDZlW3-Q9qqnFzf_ERFnBmiLTtXyk3k9n5FAIcW22lK77HxNQXuOCpU_jWp5Q==&c=BhpqzR2EkTpEAkys0sTxdgpjPLBKwXon_4F1_Ysdsm1fhoBXXenp9w==&ch=hYjIjI0qvwR4sDE4yITVNjCMXxqj_YlDYBZ_QzUilTsfyRBNz-czRw==)
---
To liberty!

Ryan D. Kelley Candidate for Michigan Governor

Nan is running for governor of Ohio against millionaire Mike DeWine because Ohio’s families are tired of being ignored. We need better jobs, lower bills, and a government that works for us. Team Nan is made up of grassroots supporters just like you. We’re proud to be in the fight for a stronger Ohio together. And when you buy merch from our store to show off your support, 100% of the profits fund our fight to flip Ohio. Thank you, Team Nan ** Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401 This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, .

name: Jason Miyares
subject: My family’s story could ONLY happen in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Safer Virginia PAC
body:
Growing up in Castro’s Communist Cuba, freedom was a distant dream for my
mother.

Friend,

Growing up in Castro’s Communist Cuba, freedom was a distant dream for my
mother.

Despite all odds, she refused to let that dream die.

Penniless and homeless –– but not hopeless –– she sacrificed everything to
come to America as a teenager with just the clothes on her back.

Looking back over 50 years later, my family’s story is an incredible testament
to the power of God’s grace and the American Dream.

My family’s story could ONLY happen in America. Nowhere else.

Unlike the children currently being taught to despise America, my mother made
sure I know why America is exceptional –– what life under socialism was like.

It’s not the utopia we’re promised.

It’s more like hell.

That’s why countless people have risked everything to come here.

That’s why countless people have given their lives to defend America.

We can never afford to forget that.

My family’s story is why I’ve devoted my entire life to making sure the
dangerous ideologies that wrecked Cuba don’t take root here.

I’ll do whatever it takes to make sure my children –– and their children ––
can experience the promise of the American Dream.

If freedom is lost in America, there will be nowhere left to run.

As we celebrate America this July 4th holiday, I encourage you to consider how
fortunate we are to live here and what it truly means to be an American.

God Bless America,

Jason Miyares

Paid for by A Safer Virginia PAC

A Safer Virginia PAC, PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23454

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe
<http://links.safervirginiapac.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_s=61f8a1ee0b974811a031f6d0946e83ae&_t=udBk0BsSRO7FKmZOJ9XjEhqh2KsXFYGHM1hxSX8YniCqkSRL1FdmsNkhvMbjVY-Pxj2YMji6XfSrVfMf26_Banx5j4iwiif3I2v6D8P29PMn3aoLTcW1GOyZ6a02Div-Vaylk9JdOumtML39NLbEhBX7a-Z6ox433mlISvIlPKM%3D>

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5753f13e642c/announcing-watermen-for-kelly-11817983?e=64ac72257a)
---
| | [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=490b960333&e=64ac72257a)

| |
# Dear Peter,

Today is the final campaign finance reporting deadline before the Maryland Republican primary, and I am asking for your help.

This week I sounded the alarm about the Democratic Governors Association's interference in our primary. They are spending over $1 million to prop up my opponent in an attempt to defeat me on July 19th.

**We aren't taking this attack on free and fair elections lying down. **

**But, I need your help to fight back. **

Early voting starts on Thursday, July 7th, and our Get Out the Vote efforts are critical to our success on July 19th.

[**Can you please make a contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 before MIDNIGHT? **](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=39af6ef9d8&e=64ac72257a)

**Make no mistake about it. With your help, we are going to win.**

Thank you,
---
|
---
| **Kelly Schulz**
Candidate for Governor

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Breaking down the Declaration
body:
Public education today is failing our nation’s young people—and their parents.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8o3i2qub4h1iuifaevobn3s806gcjjq033uliqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr7achi6hp70tbhcppjeob5elpm8odmehq78slhmior6t9hehgmdd9nmhr6asdgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6pj3cppl61jr5cb664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clhm1o70c9i66oh5u)
|
---
| | Hello, Public education today is failing our nation’s young people—and their parents. As each generation moves on from the public school system, more and more Americans are growing unaware of our country’s great history and civic traditions. But unfortunately, civics and history are too often forgotten or overlooked in the 21st century. That’s why I am committed to having conversations with thought leaders around the country and providing educational resources for Americans. But an educated citizenry is essential to self-government—and the future of freedom. That’s why I’ve issued a challenge to patriots like you to read—or re-read—the Declaration of Independence as part of our More Perfect Union Project. Because this important historical document is so rich with wisdom and eternal truths, I’ve asked my team at ACI to put together a helpful guide that offers a clear and exclusive analysis of this piece of history.
[And I’m emailing you today to make sure you get a free copy of this latest eBook: _Breaking Down the Declaration_.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgs17dunmbqli3qvev7dm8pos0soj246rsub6jbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3ge0oj4cdh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztroidfi516c4687li149bdbpp82fnbh14ndfn1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3ge0oj4cdh2bs)
When you read this book, you'll discover:
* The historical context surrounding the Declaration of Independence and why our Founders drafted it
* The 3 essential elements of the Declaration and what they meant for the establishment of our nation
* How many of King George's original offenses are being repeated by our own government today

You can get your free copy using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/breaking-down-the-declaration/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp5do6pd86kb9npdao67ht390o55uf103dtgs2a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3ge0oj4cdh2bs) And I hope you’ll share it with your family, friends, and anyone you know in our younger generations.
If we’re going stop history from repeating itself, it is critical that we educate as many people as possible. I really hope you enjoy this book. Please use this link to get instant access right now: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/breaking-down-the-declaration/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsa2kd7ightc8kpl12b2vetlgvl8khn4gr4leha8_rp22sh2s8i66pb3c3ge0oj4cdh2bs)
Regards, Dr. Ben Carson
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

|
---

body:

We need to
make sure you didn’t miss this Texas Tribune headline that our media team

We’re calling on grassroots supporters like you to come together and help
us counter Abbott’s cash advantage. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220703-1.7oJxzA&refcode=ema20220703-196741&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=196741%2E444211%2EgPWiuC ]Please, if you can, rush
your first
donation so we can match Abbott’s spending across Texas and fund our own
ads.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220703-1.7oJxzA&refcode=ema20220703-196741&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=196741%2E444211%2EgPWiuC ]Donate

Abbott’s team has said that they plan to spend as much as $100,000,000
attacking Beto. And they’re well on their way to doing exactly that.

Frankly, they’re running scared of our people-powered campaign. They see

dropping tens of millions of dollars on fear-mongering ads.

We can’t overcome this challenge without you. This is a critical moment to fight back
and show that we have what it takes to elect a new governor for Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220703-1.7oJxzA&refcode=ema20220703-196741&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=196741%2E444211%2EgPWiuC ]Instead of huge corporate and special interest checks, we’re counting

campaign. Can you be one of those people today and chip in to defeat Greg
Abbott?

Thank you so much for your support,

Team Beto

body:
Dr. Oz, man of the...People Magazine’s Lifestyles of the Rich and Famous
#
“Hey People Magazine, welcome to my crib(s)” - Dr. Oz in this video, literally.
**[Give it a watch, and when you’re done cringing, we’d be grateful if you chip in a few bucks to help us beat this out-of-touch, OUT-OF-STATE multi-millionaire.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220703-1?refcode=em20220703-6404&refcode2=6404_434096_Lux7nz&akid=6404%2E434096%2ELux7nz)**

**As a general rule of thumb, celebrity TV doctors with over $100 million in asset$ + several properties NOT IN PA don’t usually fight for working people. 🙃**
Dr. Oz is no exception.
We’ve gotta send this guy back to New Jersey pronto. That means winning every county, every vote, just like we did in the primary. And we can’t do it without your help.

Rolling Stone reported that the far-right organizers of the January 6th insurrection met with members of Congress MULTIPLE times to plan the riot. Marjorie Taylor Greene Madison Cawthorn Lauren Boebert Louie Gohmert Andy Biggs Paul Gosar Mo Brooks And Rep. Gosar even floated the idea that the insurrectionists would receive a “blanket pardon” to protect them from legal action! These members are a disgrace -- and took a SLEDGEHAMMER to our democracy. | | | Don’t wait, please respond! \-- Team Ruiz NBC NEWS: "Jan. 6 panel reveals GOP lawmakers sought Trump pardons after Capitol attack" | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? body:
| | | Peter, This is the final time we’ll reach out to you about this.

subject: Let’s Talk About RINOs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRNOVICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brnoforaz/lets-talk-about-rinos?e=6dcd2506d1)
---
| A funny thing tends to happen during GOP Primaries...

The term RINO gets attached to certain candidates’ names.

Now I’m sure you know, but just in case:

**RINO = Republican In Name Only...**

And obviously no conservative wants to be thought of as a RINO.

Personally, I believe most candidates running as conservatives really are doing it for the right reasons...

But if you are worried about if a candidate you like might be a RINO...

Just look at their track record.

Like me, for example.

**Since assuming office as the Attorney General of Arizona in 2015 I have: **

_Sued the Biden Administration over their halting of border wall construction. _

_Led a multi-state coalition lawsuit against the Biden Administration’s attempts to halt enforcement of immigration laws. _

_Took the Biden Administration to court over unconstitutional tax mandates in the latest Covid-19 relief bill..._

_Sued the Arizona Board of Regents over skyrocketing college tuition rates and also for harvesting our tax dollars and violating gift clauses..._

_Stood up to the Democratic National Committee at the U.S. Supreme Court and successfully defended Arizona’s common-sense laws restricting ballot harvesting and out-of-precinct voting..._

_Established Arizona’s first Election Integrity Unit in 2019 to “vigorously defend our state’s common sense election laws and prosecute anyone who is found to have committed voter fraud”..._

_Challenged the Biden administration when they tried to push a back door Green New Deal down our throats..._

_Stopped a serial litigator who was destroying small businesses by hitting them with copy-and-paste lawsuits for ADA infractions (the guy behind these lawsuits was later disbarred)..._

_Recovered over $1.5 billion on behalf of Arizona consumers, while fighting corporations and pharmaceutical companies who prey on our citizens..._

_Stood up for the 2_ _nd_ _Amendment and fought back against bans on high-capacity magazines and “proper cause” laws that would require you to seek special permission to carry a gun outside your home..._

_Led a 20-state brief supporting the right of Kentucky’s A.G. to defend the state’s law banning barbaric dismemberment abortions..._

_Defended Arizona’s pro-life laws against Planned Parenthood..._

_Issued a legal opinion during Covid-19 ensuring that church attendance is a Constitutionally protected activity, even during government lockdowns..._

_Led a 27-state effort before the Supreme Court on behalf of a public high school football coach who lost his job after he knelt with participating players and quietly prayed after the conclusion of football games..._

_Defended Arizona’s law prohibiting state-funded contractors from boycotting Israel..._

_Filed a first-in-the-nation lawsuit against the Biden Administration, fighting against their overreaching, illegal, and unconstitutional national vaccine mandate..._

_And defended parents’ rights and school choice. _

**I know, that was a lot...**

But the truth is, that’s only a fraction of the actions I’ve taken since becoming Attorney General...

And it’s also why, whenever someone tries to throw the word RINO at me...

I just laugh and shake my head.

Talk is cheap. Actions are priceless.

And this is also why, when it comes to the Republican Party Primary election on August 2nd...

I sincerely hope I’ll have your vote.

**My two main opponents have deep pockets but little track record...**

And while I am NOT calling either of them RINOs...

I do think it’s fair to ask:

With the country in the shape it’s in...

And with our state dealing with surging inflation and floods of illegal immigrants coming across our borders...

Don’t you want someone you can truly trust representing you in Washington D.C.?

\- Mark

I need to rely on your support today as we are faced with this monumental challenge right now. Donald Trump and his Supreme Court Justices have left a permanent stain on our country. The GOP is on a warpath to defeat me and our majority in Congress. They will do anything and everything to hold onto this seat so they can advance their right-wing agenda. Without your financial support today, we could lose IL-13 and possibly lose our majority in the House. = = My race is one of the few pick-up opportunities in the country for Democrats to hold onto their razor thin majority in the House. What’s even more concerning is that Donald Trump is putting his money down right here in Illinois. He knows that his path to a 2024 White House victory is easier if Democrats lose the majority this cycle. That means rolling back more of the progress we’ve made. It means rolling back decades of progress made by the women who fearlessly fought for their right to keep the government outside of their doctor appointments. My heart goes out to all the women who lost their lives because they didn’t have the right to a safe, legal abortion, and to all the American women who are scared right now because our rights are in grave danger. subject: Voters are shocked to hear this. Chip in today to expand our ad's reach.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
body:
$10, $25, $50 or anything at all | | | |
---
|
---
| | | **Dear Peter,**

The more voters hear about Rep. David Trone’s massive donations to radical, right-wing Republicans like anti-choice and anti-voting rights crusader, TX Gov. Greg Abbott, the more they understand that Trone’s top priority is himself, not us.

My campaign just put up a new set of online ads to help people understand that they have a choice between a public interest candidate and a pay-to-play, big money politician looking out for himself.

**I’m writing to ask: Can you chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, or anything at all right now to help us keep our new digital ads up and expand their reach? The longer they’re up, the more effective they are.[Click on this link to donate!](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=376beb331b&e=0faa9de128)**

The more voters know about David Trone, the more they are inspired to support our grassroots campaign with their vote in _this month’s_ primary election.

**[So help me spread the word, would you?](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=739673abc4&e=0faa9de128)**

With everything going on from the Supreme Court’s devastating decision to overturn Roe v. Wade to voting rights infringements, it is shocking for your typical Maryland Democrat to hear that Trone funded extremist Republicans for years to “buy access,” as he explained to the Washington Post.

Shouldn’t our Democratic representative share our fundamental values and unquestionably stand up for us?

Please donate and share our new ad. Ballots are already in hand–people are already voting, and we have no time to waste.

Thank you for everything you do for this campaign.

Sincerely,
Ben

---
| | | | Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
---
| **Our mailing address is:**
Ben Smilowitz for CongressPO Box 275Gaithersburg, MD 20884-0275
[Add us to your address book](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=bc6b94103b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=bc6b94103b).

clean_body: If there was ever a time to contribute, Peter, it’s right now. | = | Peter, it’s Joe O’Hern again, John King’s campaign manager. Tonight at 11:59PM is a critical deadline for our campaign. It’s our FINAL public fundraising deadline before the primary on July 19th, which means it’s our last chance to show just how strong of a coalition we’ve built over the last few months. I’ll be frank — money matters in campaigning. It lets everyone, including our opponents, the media, and voters just tuning in to this race, know that we have the widespread support and momentum to win this thing. Plus, we need to reach our fundraising goal in time to fuel our campaign’s ads and get John in front of undecided voters (over 20% of likely Democratic primary voters!). | = = If there was ever a time to contribute, Peter, it’s right now. Everything, from the future of our public schools to reproductive rights depends on the outcome of this election. And trust me, we don’t want to wake up after election day wishing we had done more. We’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to make sure we come out on top when we hit the deadline tonight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you, Joe * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Before the holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We know our supporters are ready to step up and support Pramila during a slow period.
#
Peter, we know you're in the middle of a holiday weekend, so we'll keep it brief.
**Holiday weekends are a notoriously tough time for grassroots, small-dollar fundraising because people check their email less frequently!** And the summer is _already_ a difficult time to fundraise for those same reasons — people are on vacation and not keeping tabs on their inbox. That's a problem when grassroots contributions make up a significant chunk of our overall fundraising.
So when we hit a fundraising slowdown like the one we're in right now, every single contribution has a bigger impact than before.
Thankfully, we know our supporters are ready to step up and support Pramila during a slow period. [**A donation of $3 or $26 (our average donation) can go a long way right now. So, can you fuel our work to re-elect Pramila, protect our House majority, and elect more people-first progressives to Congress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14503?refcode=em20220703-1396&t=1&akid=1396%2E420207%2E1dPpq8)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/14503?refcode=em20220703-1396&t=20&akid=1396%2E420207%2E1dPpq8)**
Thanks for stepping up this weekend, Peter.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220703-1396-footer&t=21&refcode2=1396_420207_1dPpq8&akid=1396%2E420207%2E1dPpq8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=1396%2E420207%2E1dPpq8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=1396%2E420207%2E1dPpq8)

body:
In the wake of the Supreme Court overturning of Roe v. Wade

|

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47360132/353998165/-1422210140?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220703-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMzU1YjNhLWZiZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o_7EXbp45cjZjablcqWeV4-VHZXanyJec9O-72PyrxQ=)
---
| Peter,

In the wake of the Supreme Court overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , it is more important than ever that we back pro-choice, Democratic Senators who won’t back down from a fight. Kirsten Gillibrand is one such leader and has clarified her stance on our SCOTUS’s appalling ruling.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47360133/353998166/-1422210140?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220703-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMzU1YjNhLWZiZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o_7EXbp45cjZjablcqWeV4-VHZXanyJec9O-72PyrxQ=)
Kirsten Gillibrand is the leader we need. Time and again, she’s championed reproductive rights, paid family leave, and access to affordable health care. [_**Right now, we need to support our leaders like Gillibrand, who know the stakes are higher than ever and will fight to defend reproductive freedom for all Americans.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47360134/353998167/-1422210140?refcode=BLU-FFP-20220703-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMzU1YjNhLWZiZmEtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o_7EXbp45cjZjablcqWeV4-VHZXanyJec9O-72PyrxQ=)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: losing this seat could mean losing abortion access across the entire country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Now that Roe v. Wade has been overturned, the stakes of this race have never been higher.
| | |
---
This is important –

Now that Roe v. Wade has been overturned, the stakes of this race have never been higher.

Mitch McConnell has made it clear that if he becomes Majority Leader, he will ban abortion in all 50 states. And my opponents would rubber-stamp his extreme, anti-choice agenda.
I will never stop fighting to protect a woman's fundamental right to an abortion. But Republicans are hell-bent on flipping this seat. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have already spent over $10 million against me and there are millions more on the way.
**Let me be clear: With the Senate split 50-50, losing this seat could mean losing abortion access across the entire country.**
**[If you're all in to stop Mitch McConnell from enacting his far-right agenda, then please chip in to my reelection campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47362988/354014814/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1215-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFhOWVlMy0xY2ZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jaFiAnnTdA2L6zOdKMINc0yQoQVuqKO4Lk_QByGvAA8=)**

name: Marco
subject: I'm personally asking you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

I'm writing today to personally ask you to be one of the 500 Election Year Founding Donors we need to defeat GOP extremism this year and flip Arizona's governorship blue. **But first, let me explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win. **
My story is the story of Arizona: I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my parents instilled in me a belief that, if you work hard, anything is possible. I grew up knowing that to be the promise of Arizona – and it's why I'm running.

Throughout my life, I've been blessed to be able to live out this promise, but too few people can say the same. I became mayor of my hometown of Nogales, served in the Obama administration and started a small business to create jobs in the state I love. But thanks to the failed leadership of Republicans like Doug Ducey, thousands of Arizonans have watched our health care and education systems suffer, our democracy face constant threats and our future get darker.
**I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona – to restore the bright future we and our families deserve. Right now we're officially in the election year, so I can't afford a single misstep. That means I need you with me, friend, from the very beginning. So I'm asking personally:**
**[Will you give $5 or more now to become an Election Year Founding Donor to our people-powered movement and guarantee we have what it takes to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47360333/353998934/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk876-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWQwZGEyNi1mZWZhLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyaxFhRje4uGBD9Eo8KajJK9Gp29WAmrPeogRhJ6y-A=)**

Right now, Wes is in a dead heat with his primary opponents, which means what we do over the course of these next two weeks will make or break our campaign for governor. name: Team Schiff
subject: Trump's latest smear: Adam “Shifty Schitt” and “watermelon head”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=454%2E5257348%2ER3tZaX ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek —

Well, there he goes again. Donald Trump stood up in front of thousands of
his strongest supporters in Nashville, Tennessee and went after Adam.
Again.

This was just after he called Adam yet another childish name on “Truth
Social” – Adam “Shifty” Schitt. That’s right, this guy used to be our
president — and wants to be again.

We’ll let you read Trump’s latest attack for yourself:

“It has warped the sense of right and wrong. They don’t have a sense of right
and wrong, true and false, good and evil. You saw the Russia, Russia hoax we all
went through for two and a half years. I watched this Adam Schiff the other day.
Shifty Schiff. Guy is nothing, he’s nothing. We call him watermelon head —
perfectly shaped [pantomimes the shape of a watermelon].”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jul2022_abs_em.4MLSU6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=454%2E5257348%2ER3tZaX ]Donald Trump

They don’t know the difference between right and wrong, Trump claims.
Well, someone doesn’t, that is for sure. Donald Trump always accuses
others of having the same lack of morality that he does. He certainly
doesn’t have a moral compass — and can’t differentiate between right and
wrong, true and false, or good and evil.

But here’s the thing. Trump didn’t stop there. He went on to accuse Adam
of doctoring evidence (he didn’t), making up his campaign’s use of Russian
interference (Trump did that in great abundance), and saying that Don Jr.
secretly met with Russians to get dirt on his political opponent (has he
forgotten about Junior’s meeting in Trump Tower to get dirt on Hillary
from the Russians?!).

“Now, think about how bad a person you have to be. You know it’s a fake story.
It was made up by him and Hillary Clinton ... how bad of a human being do you have
to be? Think about it.”

Listen, Trump attacks Adam — a lot. But it’s what happens next that we
need to respond to. Trump’s allies in Congress and conservative media
amplify his attacks, and create new ones that are even worse.

Since Trump’s attacks, Fox News has attacked Adam well over a dozen times.
And Adam has been attacked on Newsmax and OAN. He was even “trending” on
Twitter because of lies spread by Sean Hannity and Tucker Carlson.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jul2022_abs_em.4MLSU6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=454%2E5257348%2ER3tZaX ]Can you help us respond to these attacks by Donald Trump, Fox News and
others, by rushing $5, $10 or $25 to our campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jul2022_abs_em.ilu4SR&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=454%2E5257348%2ER3tZaX ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jul2022_abs_em.IWaPA0&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=454%2E5257348%2ER3tZaX ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jul2022_abs_em._yhdSu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220703_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=454%2E5257348%2ER3tZaX ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

Hello,
Fox News and my opponent Chuck Grassley are hot to paint me as “liberal.” They’re already calling me a radical socialist who is the most liberal person to ever run for office. (*eye roll*)
Bit of history: Iowa was one of the first states to open college for women, to elect women to public office, and admit female lawyers to the bar. We were the second state in the nation to allow interracial marriage and the first state to desegregate public schools. Iowa is home to America’s oldest mosque, and we were the third state to recognize same-sex marriage.
You would think the good Senator would recall these events... Perhaps Grassley has forgotten Iowa and who we are – or maybe he’s just once again playing partisan politics and courting the support of far-right fringe groups to try to win reelection.
**Iowa has always been a place of progressive values, and I am running against Chuck Grassley because it’s time to return our state to its roots of advocating equality and caring for one another.**
Chuck Grassley, his Super PAC buddies, and Fox News are already attacking me and even my military service. The polls show a close race, and if I defeat Grassley this November, Democrats are guaranteed to keep our Senate majority this November.
**I’m ready to fight back, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give me the tools to do it. We need to raise another $35,000 before our deadline at midnight tonight, and right now, we are falling dangerously short.**
[**I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, so I have only grassroots donors like you to turn to: Please, will you make a donation to my campaign right now – whatever amount you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47363760/354017923/-42398318?refcode=em20220703pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDEyNjBlZi0yOGZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uHWuNJUuLESucNqUgnEsZZbFkw8j0AjAFmHOryaEUGc=)

name: Cecile Richards
subject: Change is coming to Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Jane Roe — the plaintiff of Roe v. Wade — was a Texan. So were both of her
attorneys, Linda Coffee and Sarah Weddington.

Born and raised in Texas, they argued for a woman’s right to choose before
the all-male Supreme Court in 1973.

No one rode to our rescue from outside of Texas. No one saved the day for
us. Texas women showed up, fought back, and won protections for
reproductive rights — not just for themselves but for every woman
nationwide.

Now, 49 years later, Greg Abbott’s extreme trigger law is set to outlaw
all abortions in Texas without exception for rape or incest.

It’s true once again —
nobody is riding in to save us from outside Texas. It’s on you, it’s on
me, it’s on all of us. And with us in this fight every step of the way is
my friend Beto O’Rourke.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220703-2.Z8YNEr&refcode=ema20220703-196464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=196464%2E444211%2EhzAGmA ]Repro rights rally in Austin

Take a look at that photo. What you’re looking at is thousands of Texans
coming together to rally for our reproductive freedom. Beto’s campaign put
that event in the Texas Capital together in a matter of hours. And as a
lifelong Texan, this image fills me with a lot of hope.

Change is coming to Texas. Beto understands that action is the
antidote to despair, and the key to victory. He is inspiring unmistakable
grassroots energy in every part of our state, and building a coalition of
millions of Texas voters who reject Greg Abbott’s extreme decision to
strip us of our fundamental rights.

Make no mistake, we are up against massive political power in this fight.
So if we are going to restore reproductive freedom in Texas, we must seize
political power on our own — beginning by electing a governor who believes
in a woman’s freedom to make her own decisions about her own body, health
care, and future.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220703-2.Z8YNEr&refcode=ema20220703-196464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=196464%2E444211%2EhzAGmA ]We need you with us.
As a proud part of this campaign, I’m asking you to pitch in any amount
you can to help us defeat Greg Abbott and elect Beto.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220703-2.Z8YNEr&refcode=ema20220703-196464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=196464%2E444211%2EhzAGmA ]Contribute $3

Just like the Texas women who took their fight all the way to the Supreme
Court in 1973, I believe we will come together and do whatever it takes to
reclaim what is rightfully ours: the ability to make decisions about our
own bodies.

We are the ones to meet this moment. It is on all of us to do our part.

In solidarity,

Cecile

Cecile Richards
National Finance Chair, Beto for Texas
Former President of Planned Parenthood

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=196464%2E444211%2EhzAGmA

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Fellow American,

Doug Flutie is a guy who needs no introduction.

He is remembered for his "Hail Mary" pass at Boston College, winning the Heisman Trophy in 1984, and playing professional football for over 21 years. But to me, Doug Flutie will always be remembered as a good guy and GREAT friend.

**[Doug recorded a quick message for you, Fellow American, and I'll hope you take a minute to watch it!>>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=463afce4f9094280b907ee82ef6a7e9f&_e=J7IT1IHASWch-p22Rl7qSi068NM7ryOnOdRHlJC1jPmVIYgMcHeHjPmU7rzQHHO-4wkQTtCMvL8haSVZrlGmaE_etEsdL4V-L9hHNlhEyOcgD_iB-PAzPvXzPTr_0EcvusXB5wNj1NIr2FsGXpp24KHMlt3_-8H8UCbz3yHbHy8WzDsLNLN0hh-pqPVu_qfe7SXIsv9bOVnini1T6kjZA8VKU73PH2MIq9VEfSq8Qlu5CFMym7v9EopS_q_wXTS1SzsiSP_7lNOK2lLeLu9E7f6tJddhhMJgRLQyUnWkWOWsLaspcUxSVsM8R33V7ROK0AiUjLzghlOg28cuow3mZWPN_53ZTY4MrntCLvbRsTplAUsieJrPdfjQYF0vYGFV0H5msCBwQyaHP4yZaOJbYcKr256-lChz-W1QlI6TPbmCP5WSmJoRNVup4IoWTTQlkuHWonLiSL-XiSEHFvUhKy-D9rVzgw7KB_pPBgrvDxqNrnf0PUOUE_jsCejJ3Lv5)**

clean_body: Doug Flutie is a good friend of mine and a sports legend. He recorded a brief video for you, and I’ll hope you take a moment to watch it! >>> | Fellow American, Doug Flutie is a guy who needs no introduction. He is remembered for his "Hail Mary" pass at Boston College, winning the Heisman Trophy in 1984, and playing professional football for over 21 years. But to me, Doug Flutie will always be remembered as a good guy and GREAT friend. Doug has endorsed my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because he knows I won't stop until WE WIN. We cannot lose this race, Fellow American, because too much is a stake. Raphael Warnock and Senate Democrats are CRIPPLING this country, and we've got to get America back on the right track. I won't stop fighting until we win, but Doug and I need you to hear from YOU to pick up the pace. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Friend, **the U.S. Supreme Court just overturned Roe v. Wade and Republican lawmakers in states across the country are pushing new restrictions on abortion access.**
GOP extremists are trying to take reproductive rights away from women no matter their circumstances. In Arizona, the legislature passed an ultra-restrictive 15-week abortion ban – and Idaho Governor Brad Little (R) signed a bill banning abortion after 6 weeks, modeled after Texas' egregious law. **These are all outrageous attempts to undermine reproductive freedom – and we CANNOT stand for it.**

name: Team Abrams
subject: Just a few questions for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR
body:
There’s only one way we can overcome Brian Kemp’s fundraising lead and attacks from national Republicans and outside groups — and that’s by digging deep, together.
Derek, we’ve got a question for you:

If you knew chipping in just $5 could elect Stacey Abrams,**[would you give right away?

](https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220703_B2_IfYouKnew_S1_T1_TSA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=2&akid=848%2E1862389%2ExaJF3a) ** What if you know that your $5 could expand Medicaid in Georgia and open up gates of opportunity for people all across the state?

**What if you knew Brian Kemp was going to do whatever it took to rig the game and hold onto his power?

** $5 on its own may not sound like a lot. But if even 10% of the people reading this email chipped in right now, it really would move the needle.

And in a race this close, it’s going to come down to whether or not we were able to reach every single voter necessary to win — and we’ll only be able to do that if we’re powered by folks chipping in $5 or whatever they can afford.

Derek, there’s only one way we can overcome Brian Kemp’s fundraising lead and attacks from national Republicans and outside groups — and that’s by digging deep, together.

**We are less than five months out from Election Day. Now that you know just how much it would mean:

** **[Please, chip in $5 right now and make a difference in this fight to elect Stacey Abrams.](https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1490?refcode=sa_em_220703_B2_IfYouKnew_S1_T1_TSA_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=3&akid=848%2E1862389%2ExaJF3a)**

******[DONATE](https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1491?refcode=sa_em_220703_B2_IfYouKnew_S1_T1_TSA_30open_RS&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=4&akid=848%2E1862389%2ExaJF3a)******
Thank you,

Team Abrams
* * *
PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR

** _A Note From Nikki:_** Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. clean_body: | | | Friend, If you have three minutes to spare, would you mind taking our today? This important survey is a great tool for us to gather input from our members and strategize for the upcoming election. With your help, we can elect bold conservative leaders in November. Thank you in advance for taking the time to complete this survey. Sincerely, Stand For America PAC Team | A Note From Nikki: Growing up, smart, strong, and unconventional women were discouraged. When I ran for office, the South Carolina legislature was dominated by a Good Old Boys' Club and my opponent thought women shouldn’t be in politics. People thought I was too brown, too female, too young, too conservative, too principled. I said: Too bad. I was inspired by great women who broke barriers and defied expectations, women like Margaret Thatcher and Jeane Kirkpatrick. That’s why I wrote this book. "If You Want Something Done..." is set to be released on October 4. To pre-order your signed copy of "If You Want Something Done..." chip in $45 or more. | | Copyright © 2021 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. Stand For America PAC does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. name: Penny Ronning for Congress
subject: Reminder: Democracy is Worth Fighting For
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Penny Ronning for U
body:
Will you join us?
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jlzluAK5L5NV5rzpy8EPKMFKhiFfK_MJ3f2zAXh6I18jQphTD-_r2qPR5ft11oNsHrzJJssD6V95gd4V-QoWFDxjjd5QVTnkJnYyQSheB9Q_wmCnUsvJhSu9yjAcNA0fvM1GSGCh99CIuS5MYvnFvQ==&c=TmyC_PqIXDWtjuDVkLSvDIA5NPHMvHFRsVMNNSprqoO8Bsa98W-j9g==&ch=GaEpdtcl4ZSTEAOYu9QYKoJ9JQ3w56fNkPo3-tz5qG-QDCn_vCb9dA==)
---
| Democracy is Worth Fighting For
---
| Dear Peter,
Our campaign believes strongly in Campaign Finance Reform. We believe elections should NOT be about money. Past elections have shown us that whoever has the most money does not always win. Money does NOT equal votes.
BUT
Campaigns cost money.
We use donations responsibly to achieve results. Penny is not paid to campaign even though she is campaigning full time. Her core team has been and is all volunteer.
However,
We are in the process of hiring a campaign manager and look forward to bringing on the most qualified candidate.
We believe democracy is worth fighting for and that's exactly what we are doing throughout Montana's Congressional District 2. In the Primary, Penny traveled more than 8,000 miles from February right up to the Primary Election, and she's been out on the road again now that we are in the General Election.
Will you join with us to support this fight for our democracy? For the rights and freedoms we are watching being stripped away by the majority on the U.S. Supreme Court?
Please donate what you can. Know that our spending is done with careful consideration on what is most effective in this fight against the WORST representative Montana has ever seen.
The primary source of Matt Rosendale's money comes from PACs and that's who he is beholden to.
The primary source of Penny's money comes from everyday Montanans and that's who she is beholden to.
BIG DIFFERENCE.
We are asking for your financial support today.
Thank you for joining with us. We are grateful for your support and partnership.
PLEASE DONATE $3, $5, $10 or More TODAY!
---
---
| |
---
| Donate TODAY!
You can donate online here or by sending a check to: Penny Ronning for U.S. Congress PO Box 22445 Billings, MT 59104

disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
I’m a proud progressive running to bring lasting change to Maryland.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47364296/354028997/-2095950150?source=email-ngp-20220703-fr_180-JK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220703-fr_180-JK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220703&&&&utm_content=fr_180&&&&utm_term=JK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=b5fefa6e-30fb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWZlZmE2ZS0zMGZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aB9Kgw-WBFuvTpmWerRZ4AIeW0D_GzufX-Eppyz5JmU=)

| Team, Thank you for your support during our fundraising push over the last few days. I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails from my team, **but this is the last time I’ll email you before our FINAL public fundraising deadline at 11:59 PM tonight. ** You know me, Peter. I’m a proud progressive running to bring lasting change to Maryland. I’m running to address the climate crisis in a meaningful way, to invest in our public schools so Maryland can offer every student a world-class education, and as the Pro-Choice Maryland Action endorsed candidate, to protect and expand reproductive rights for all. clean_body: I’m a proud progressive running to bring lasting change to Maryland. | = | Team, Thank you for your support during our fundraising push over the last few days. I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails from my team, but this is the last time I’ll email you before our FINAL public fundraising deadline at 11:59 PM tonight. You know me, Peter. I’m a proud progressive running to bring lasting change to Maryland. I’m running to address the climate crisis in a meaningful way, to invest in our public schools so Maryland can offer every student a world-class education, and as the Pro-Choice Maryland Action endorsed candidate, to protect and expand reproductive rights for all. BREAKING NEWS: Biden urges assault weapons ban, as U.S. House Democrats advance gun control bills
15,000 Signatures Needed:
Sign Now to urge Congress to Ban Assault Weapons >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-5-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-5-1]

This petition is for dpwillis67@gmail.com.
When America had an assault weapons ban from 1994-2004, mass shootings were down by over 40%.
This year alone, there have been over 230 mass shootings.
We need Congress to act immediately to pass an assault weapons ban.
Our nation is in the midst of a gun violence crisis. Every day, more than 110 Americans die from gun violence. We don’t have to be numb to this. We don’t have to live like this. We don’t have to die like this.
But without enough public support, Congress may not take this critical action on gun safety. So we’re gathering 15,000 Democrats to pressure Congress to Ban Assault Weapons. The petition closes at midnight. Please sign the petition immediately: [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/ban-assault-weapons-5-1]

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4436%2E3611125%2Eow6gG0 ][IMG]

Folks, we’re expecting a huge fundraising slowdown with the
holiday tomorrow, so I wanted to reach out before you log off. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15943?t=1008&amount=4&akid=4436%2E3611125%2Eow6gG0 ]If you
can, will you chip in $4 to my campaign? Here are 4 reasons why:

1. Polls have me and JD Vance neck-and-neck. We need resources early in
the month to close the gap and pull ahead.

2. Ohio’s open Senate seat will decide Senate control. Our race is one of
Democrats’ best chances at flipping a seat this year.

3. There’s a whole lot on the line. A 50/50 Senate has failed to protect
abortion, expand healthcare access, end the filibuster, and cut workers in
on the deal.

4. JD Vance and his far-right billionaire backers are upping their
attacks. They’ve got money to burn and they’re spending $80 million to
keep Ohio red.

We’ve got a lot to accomplish between now and Election Day—but we’re
already experiencing a bit of a summer fundraising slump. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/15943?t=1009&amount=4&akid=4436%2E3611125%2Eow6gG0 ]We’ll need to
pick up the pace if we’re going to compete with the big money boosting JD
Vance. Can I count on you to chip in $4 before you peace out?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

body:
**Our Supreme Court has lost credibility.**
**[Tell Congress: It’s time to reform SCOTUS.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47362643/354012964/242859865?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220703_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg2OGQyOS0xYWZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYqkkSJ_OYGVbw1_lIwn0GBUC7Ogsm1AuH8R6oGYl9M=&emci=c11e0871-17fb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=35868d29-1afb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
Peter, we’ve just emerged from one of the most radical, hyper-partisan Supreme Court terms in history.
Expanding the Court, implementing term limits, and creating a code of ethics will depoliticize the court, restore balance and rescue its legitimacy.
**Accountability to the American people is essential to restoring and maintaining the credibility of the Supreme Court. **
**[Sign on to demand SCOTUS reform. We want term limits, court expansion, and a code of ethics for justices!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47362644/354012965/242859865?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220703_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg2OGQyOS0xYWZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYqkkSJ_OYGVbw1_lIwn0GBUC7Ogsm1AuH8R6oGYl9M=&emci=c11e0871-17fb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=35868d29-1afb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47362645/354012966/242859865?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220703_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg2OGQyOS0xYWZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYqkkSJ_OYGVbw1_lIwn0GBUC7Ogsm1AuH8R6oGYl9M=&emci=c11e0871-17fb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=35868d29-1afb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)
Affirming voter suppression laws, overturning Roe, and threatening the civil and human rights that we have fought so hard for are just a few recent misdeeds of this Court.
The Supreme Court is facing a crisis of public confidence.
**Democrats are pushing to expand and reform the court. We need to send MORE Democrats like Derek to Congress to make this a reality. **
**[Stand with Derek’s campaign and sign on: Urge Congress to reform the Supreme Court NOW to protect justice and democracy!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47362646/354012967/242859865?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220703_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTg2OGQyOS0xYWZiLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYqkkSJ_OYGVbw1_lIwn0GBUC7Ogsm1AuH8R6oGYl9M=&emci=c11e0871-17fb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=35868d29-1afb-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
Let’s restore balance and ethics to the Supreme Court,
Marshall for Congress

Affirming voter suppression laws, overturning Roe, and threatening the civil and human rights that we have fought so hard for are just a few recent misdeeds of this Court. The Supreme Court is facing a crisis of public confidence. Democrats are pushing to expand and reform the court. We need to send MORE Democrats like Derek to Congress to make this a reality. Let’s restore balance and ethics to the Supreme Court, Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

Peter,

Doug Flutie is a guy who needs no introduction.

GOAL: $10,000 || DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We can't thank you enough for your support, VPP | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 ckq.io/eguhtk The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. subject: 3 things freedom is *not*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi , Is freedom dying 15 years younger because you’re poor? Is freedom not being able to get an abortion? Is freedom the color of your skin making it harder for you to vote? No. True freedom is the freedom to live a happy, healthy, and secure life so you can focus on living the life you want and following your dreams. Your dreams to start a business, start a family, learn a new language — whatever the case may be. [**That’s the freedom I’ll fight for in Congress. If you can, please chip in now to help me win so I can do that. Thank name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawnna=20Bolick?=
subject: Legislative Wrap-Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
AZ budget passed with border security and school choice wins! | | |
---
| | Good afternoon Freedom Fighters,

Last week, the legislature passed Arizona’s FY ‘23 budget. I want to highlight two major, hard-fought conservative victories from the budget—border security and education freedom bills.
---
| [Keep Our State Leadership Conservative](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a050928abb&e=a7ab36849c "Keep Our State Leadership Conservative")
---
| **Border Security**
In Arizona, Biden’s invasion on our southern border has left us vulnerable to fentanyl and cartel violence. The [almost 240,000 illegal migrants](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e77ca4b833&e=a7ab36849c) at our southern border in May alone demonstrates just how far this crisis has come. That’s why the budget this year funds our current needs to the Fed’s shortfall. We allocated $560 million to the Border Security Fund and added more money to the Border Strike Force. This funding includes:
* $335 million for a border fence
* $53 million for county sherrifs, including retention and new signing bonuses
* $30 million for local border prosecution
* $30 million for a new State Emergency Operations Center
* $10 million for deploying the National Guard to the southern border

I’m proud to have supported this bill because when Washington fails to protect us it's up to the Arizona legislature to get the job done.
---
| [Help Build the #RedWave in 2022!](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=52db016221&e=a7ab36849c "Help Build the #RedWave in 2022!")
---
| **Education Freedom**
Many Arizona families continued to witness the unfolding disasters in our district public schools and the obscene curriculum making its way into our kids' classroom. Parents in Arizona desperately need options and this session we expanded [empowerment scholarship accounts](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=58c271c775&e=a7ab36849c) for all Arizona families. I’m proud to have sponsored this bill because hundreds of thousands more Arizona parents were waiting for the ability to give their children the education they desperately need. Loosening the stranglehold education unions have over our children respects the unique responsibility parents have to make decisions for their children.
---
| [Support a Conservative Candidate that Puts Parents First](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a2fc507947&e=a7ab36849c "Support a Conservative Candidate that Puts Parents First")
---
| I want to thank everyone who supported me this past legislative session. It’s because of your sacrifice and generosity that true conservatives found victory in much needed wins at the Capitol. I hope you will continue to support me as I fight to be Arizona’s next Secretary of State.
---
| [Send a True Conservative Leader to the Office of Secretary of State](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c086e839c9&e=a7ab36849c "Send a True Conservative Leader to the Office of Secretary of State")
---
| Thank you for your continued support,
---
|
---
| Shawnna Bolick
---
| Please join us at one of our upcoming events:

**Wednesday, July 6 th**
Please join me and other candidates for a Candidate Meet and Greet in Sun Lakes. For address please RSVP to Ben at [info@bolickforarizona.com](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com).

**Friday, July 15 th**
Please join me and other statewide candidates for a Candidate Meet and Greet in Cave Creek. For address please RSVP to Ben at [info@bolickforarizona.com](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com).

---
