name: Charles Booker
subject: Freedom wasn’t something that was given to us, we always had to struggle for it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Freedom has long been the story of America. But we know the truth is that
for so many people in Kentucky and across the country — freedom for all
hasn’t always been a reality.

I come from a long line of Kentuckians. I’ve had ancestors who were
enslaved in this Commonwealth. Lynched in this Commonwealth. Fought for
desegregation in this Commonwealth. Because they knew freedom wasn’t
something that was gonna be given to us, we have always had to fight for
it.

And we’re still fighting for it.

To this day, Black Americans still face deadly, systemic racism in our
communities. We’re still fighting to get our leaders to agree that our
lives matter. After the Supreme Court ruled to overturn Roe v. Wade, they
effectively stripped away the right to make deeply personal decisions for
our bodies for millions of women in our country. And now, those same
far-right Supreme Court justices are preparing to overturn even more
critical decisions that protect our rights.

This extremist agenda doesn’t represent who we are as a country. And I
refuse to allow a handful of extremist politicians to control the
trajectory of this country.

Rand Paul is the reason why Trump succeeded in his mission to stack the
court with far-right judges.

Rand Paul is the reason why the Emmett Till Antilynching Act, a bill that
recognizes lynching as a hate crime, was blocked.

And Rand Paul is the reason why so many Kentuckians have lost trust in our
politics.

Our campaign is working to put this to an end. This election, we have the
opportunity to make that vision of America — freedom for all — a reality.

If we work together, from the Hood to the Holler, I know that we have a
real shot to remove Rand Paul from office and start creating a new kind of
politics that lifts ALL of us up. We can build a future where Breonna’s
door isn't kicked in, where every community across Kentucky is thriving,
and everyone has a chance to have a good paying union job.

But I can’t win this alone,
Peter.

So before you enjoy the rest of your holiday weekend, [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220703.lNBgya&refcode=em20220703-2182&t=1001&akid=2182%2E346206%2E-OkUbb ]I hope you can
make a $5 donation to our campaign and join me in this
fight to make freedom ring for the people of Kentucky and our entire
country.

Let’s do this,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220703-2182-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2182_346206_-OkUbb&akid=2182%2E346206%2E-OkUbb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2182%2E346206%2E-OkUbb

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

America was built by generations of people, many of whom bled and died for it. America is not perfect, but it is our home, and has given you a life of incredible prosperity.

It would be nice if everyone loved it as much as you + me and showed a bit of gratitude. But too many of our leaders have made it clear they hate America and the people who built this country. [**Donate here to elect America-First leaders to Senate.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=15b0126120094fb7bd3d91cdb3830bf6&_e=1OZvO7uGB92tSj2SmtilfEmHBCIuGVnGkXVqmX6U0jh70_s4eTheOhYdpoxYrta29ExtCxUDchNUbwe72x30qQxmq6Rxy7QMGJCgeHFhRPchtD3Ff9h5zHTXwl-k55kSmsGWy3Ihsub7yeqB6vSangTypb9s30PCdhFEuuRABu58b4ShcMqa506dZYY4a6w23Hau0ZC3vWpdde9ilBHD2oKXQRxAea2DAMXMR6UkIkFlaXUYgYwKIs9tniXiXp4OPpxNXYBP1Y4ZP-ysXyy-WwG3IeMaPb21uda5Y-uCfCdAiVF_WwGrRhlZi4N1oLdD6dOvEc39Vqx9P26FGeHJN8GyMaNxdUAxxc5ZvJz0LD4YOd0l7QoVJzj4ViJH8EbSaSAdlusJUFGhoJsg9cnRUPBZYofalm2KtgyIhgvro3803vYA21i2ii2vefJpDcmzlBHiryxJba9HErHk3DAoHTRzs8JKBAk8VdqByo885D7fGVLS6eJ3bLBRXcEv6lHY)

America was built by generations of people, many of whom bled and died for it. America is not perfect, but it is our home, and has given you a life of incredible prosperity. It would be nice if everyone loved it as much as you + me and showed a bit of gratitude. But too many of our leaders have made it clear they hate America and the people who built this country. I didn’t grow up with a trust fund. I’m a hillbilly, and all the hillbillies I know love this country with everything they have. They are my family, friends, and neighbors. So maybe it isn’t so bad to be a hillbilly after all... Have a great Fourth of July tomorrow, JD Sent from my iPhone | Paid for by Vance Victory, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and comprised of JD Vance for Senate Inc., Working for Ohio and Ohio Republican Party. Vance Victory, PO Box 6563 Cincinnati OH 45206 Copyright © 2022 JD Vance for US Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
|
Fellow American,

**Democrats outraised us last month — and they’re on track to do so again this month.**

We can’t let this become a trend.

**They have coastal elites and rich liberals giving them MILLIONS to spend smearing conservative Republicans in battleground states.**

We have grassroots patriots like YOU. It’s time to get off the sidelines, because if we don’t have the resources to compete, we won’t take back the U.S. Senate in November.

**_I need 1,000 of you reading this email right now to chip in whatever you can. Your support could make or break our chances of winning in November and stopping the madness._**

It’s time to get off the sidelines, because if we don’t have the resources to compete, we won’t take back the U.S. Senate in November. I need 1,000 of you reading this email right now to chip in whatever you can. Your support could make or break our chances of winning in November and stopping the madness. There is too much at stake to assume we’re going to win in November. Democrats aren’t taking their foot off the gas, and neither can we. So please act now. In service, Tom Cotton If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
So much is at stake
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SOa1-_VdouKI0Lk5N4tsv9VyYJeDp2U4qYgDFbhrs0SX2Ogdssyz2i7qsjiPhsqKYS_juSdw0lIfGRuSCZaQADFTL1ILzO0GgcXGM_RzoRxsT3bbGZnWuSqiaOpbxo2Xopays9lL8Dok8yxhPWfQMg==&c=TU38dU3e2rGl-k1BM2AI5QKFrpCdo7pnh3m-7LMKpUSHMa5N-9DQsg==&ch=03linuyzls4MENvcEvI1xrzMNQLk0v5W3Hy2RYmsywIuuvQFDlsdcw==)
---
| What Does Freedom Mean to You
---
| Dear Peter,
As we watch the partisan majority of the United States Supreme Court strip our freedoms, we must ask ourselves, "What does freedom mean to me?"
What does it mean to my children's future?
What does it mean to our environment?
Our religious/non-religious belief systems?
Our ability to marry the person we love?
And so much more.
With the current U.S. Supreme Court, winning Democrats to the U.S. House of Representatives and the Montana State Legislature has never been more important.
THIS is the time to dig down deep and give your all to this fight for our democracy and our freedom.
Contact your local Democratic Central Committee and volunteer for candidates in your area. Donate to their campaigns.
If you do not know how to contact the Democratic Central Committee in your county, reply to this email or contact Carmelita Dominguez at the email address below. Our campaign will connect you.
Every election is won at the LOCAL level. Please, volunteer, donate, and get involved! Our freedoms and our democracy are being threatened and taken. We cannot sit by and let this happen. Too much is at stake and make no mistake - they are coming for more than what they've already taken.
On this 4th of July weekend, think about what freedom means to you and then make a plan to help one or more Democratic candidates in your area to get elected.
Thank you! Together we rise.
PLEASE DONATE $3, $5, $10 or More TODAY!
---
---
| |
---
| Donate TODAY!
You can donate online here or by sending a check to: Penny Ronning for U.S. Congress PO Box 22445 Billings, MT 59104

clean_body: So much is at stake | | | | == | What Does Freedom Mean to You | Dear Peter, As we watch the partisan majority of the United States Supreme Court strip our freedoms, we must ask ourselves, "What does freedom mean to me?" What does it mean to my children's future? What does it mean to our environment? Our religious/non-religious belief systems? Our ability to marry the person we love? And so much more. With the current U.S. Supreme Court, winning Democrats to the U.S. House of Representatives and the Montana State Legislature has never been more important. THIS is the time to dig down deep and give your all to this fight for our democracy and our freedom. Contact your local Democratic Central Committee and volunteer for candidates in your area. Donate to their campaigns. If you do not know how to contact the Democratic Central Committee in your county, reply to this email or contact Carmelita Dominguez at the email address below. Our campaign will connect you. Every election is won at the LOCAL level. Please, volunteer, donate, and get involved! Our freedoms and our democracy are being threatened and taken. We cannot sit by and let this happen. Too much is at stake and make no mistake - they are coming for more than what they've already taken. On this 4th of July weekend, think about what freedom means to you and then make a plan to help one or more Democratic candidates in your area to get elected. Thank you! Together we rise. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Schwab?=
subject: Sunday Campaign Round Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwab for SOS, Matthew Goddard, Treasurer
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

In just one month, Kansans will head to the polls to vote in one of the most important elections of our generation.

After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, the fight for life in Kansas has become even more important. On August 2, Kansans have the opportunity to show their commitment to valuing life and protecting women by passing Value Them Both. Now more than ever, it is imperative that Kansans vote YES on August 2 and return the power to create policy back to the legislative branch.
---
| Last Friday, I enjoyed breakfast with members of the Knights of Columbus in Overland Park. The morning, which would soon become historic with the overturning of Roe v. Wade, was spent building new friendships and sharing our conservative message on how my administration has strengthened election security, eliminated outdated government regulations, and reduced filing burdens on small businesses.
---
|
---
| ICYMI: earlier this week, the Kansas State Rifle Association PAC endorsed me for a second term as Secretary of State. As my children learn gun safety and gun education, it is my priority to ensure their constitutional rights are thoroughly protected.

It is an honor to be endorsed by the KSRA, and with your help, I look forward to a second term in office supporting efforts to protect the Second Amendment.
---
|
---
| Team Schwab had a blast kicking off the Fourth of July weekend at Wild West Fest in Hays - and of course, it is always great to see my friend, Representative Barb Wasinger.

While in Hays, I passed by the community pool where I spent my summers as a lifeguard to pay for my tuition at Fort Hays State University. Coming back now, I see the impact those summers had on molding the man I strive to be and teach my sons, every day: the value of hard work and the importance of humility.
---
|
---
---
| Schwab for Secretary of State highway and yard signs are going up across the state! Need a sign? Click [HERE](mailto:info@scottschwab.com?subject=I%20want%20a%20yard%20sign!) to request yours.
---
|
---
| As we sprint towards Election Day, please remember that your vote matters. Your vote is secure. Your vote counts. I humbly ask for your support on August 2.

Respectfully,
---
|
---
| Scott Schwab
Kansas Secretary of State
---

name: Hillsdale College via Backing America
subject: The problem of progressive education
body:
You’ve probably noticed the spread of anti-American ideology into every area of American life.

[Unsubscribe](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=a00ff785881644c58b0cb1978e8834ec&_t=wOMtp1skYkZgp_sdZwM0nV3SmhsXAYSywTQlkowqG0l-7ISyYLRuCtJXy-FlYYrnNY7KwjrblltBHyFo1yxN4E4nj7giifipgduAXr03rGgXXEIo6pLU9mlo_3eNxLE-s1fJ0I6S5CnIkxwcOm_rsTcmZUDaognPjxXVyWfCJWEYMmKjB7xxgxOv07Ger-FR403vHoInCmnFOhipD9rqYm9naXapvEHYSV9DoAcXnF0%3D)
_Please see a message from our sponsor:_
---
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a00ff785881644c58b0cb1978e8834ec&_e=WEQ5DcOCDS4RJHjAmYjMLg9GC8tVfdkLNX28b8vPkehLzYoAoqKg1zijRKskNz8LmsbCEPdG7ygU59MBZ8Fak7RTr4m09mS1ZuZ_AtkoTB9agmA5U3aNLvAvSWFPtfd9hIDGvEGxGi34TMim95PVmPSkiaE_bzO84JAab110bsB9xufIzmZbTfMrO3YkxurqDG6sJuUzOq42Tq3U0kCc4dItJ-_9d_3M36R2RVr1LOO0OzEeTkoZGtkbt5l-CB5ObssyFw6HtVQpmyhgcKh709gh4Tyt3E6PEp_UpzFPlbB355RT-zNfaUMa7g0Tkg5-3APPR4AOxzkx3mi4bgjaSObs9dyuWkXSP-PkAr4FdZ7DiodkLY7f9eyqjSSlfAzma_B_rjPkdsqxHQrWi9HVmFPAbpDg8uwsit8LaJHPw_JSw_ED_61LxlN8-0YXnhr2orgDHIAiDBHEQ4j7uwsgjlyHO2BT_5MoC6Mdi4PKtn0%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
You’ve probably noticed the spread of anti-American ideology into every area of American life.
---
| | Consider the 2019 controversy surrounding the Betsy Ross flag. Even though this was three years ago, you still may have heard of it.
Shortly before Independence Day, Nike announced its plans to release an athletic shoe featuring the Betsy Ross flag. Then Nike spokesman Colin Kaepernick objected, condemning the flag as a symbol of racism and slavery.

You won’t be surprised to learn that a social media storm followed, with Nike announcing that it was halting the production of the shoe.
---
| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a00ff785881644c58b0cb1978e8834ec&_e=WEQ5DcOCDS4RJHjAmYjMLg9GC8tVfdkLNX28b8vPkehLzYoAoqKg1zijRKskNz8LmsbCEPdG7ygU59MBZ8Fak7RTr4m09mS1ZuZ_AtkoTB9agmA5U3aNLvAvSWFPtfd9hIDGvEGxGi34TMim95PVmPSkiaE_bzO84JAab110bsB9xufIzmZbTfMrO3YkxurqDG6sJuUzOq42Tq3U0kCc4dItJ-_9d_3M36R2RVr1LOO0OzEeTkoZGtkbt5l-CB5ObssyFw6HtVQpmyhgcKh70whFC1vixLYfADT0zXxxNlJG0RrpJZOK74DyOg7_A47eKPVESHN_SGieWEOAxTyXPILiioA2O1PLVsSVKEY5hcFNy3lIoHQC444h5BlvKzZdmnCOMwj6PvMxnD0eqVCOOFdmOy8L9TqB3jL4TXiLLO87Wl7THVz3oMelW7zGskZGv6ztPKI9h854d50kNHJojkmeU0rL5eLj5inbKLenxcc%3D)
---
| | The Kaepernick episode illustrates the problem of progressive education, which seeks to rewrite our nation’s history, and undermine the kind of informed patriotism essential to preserving liberty.

Now that you know what a few others think of the Betsy Ross flag...

...I hope you will give us your thoughts about the teaching of American history, including the American Revolution and the Declaration of Independence, by taking a short survey.

Just follow this link to share your opinion:

_[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/betsy-ross-flag-survey/](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a00ff785881644c58b0cb1978e8834ec&_e=WEQ5DcOCDS4RJHjAmYjMLg9GC8tVfdkLNX28b8vPkehLzYoAoqKg1zijRKskNz8LmsbCEPdG7ygU59MBZ8Fak7RTr4m09mS1ZuZ_AtkoTB9agmA5U3aNLvAvSWFPtfd9hIDGvEGxGi34TMim95PVmPSkiaE_bzO84JAab110bsB9xufIzmZbTfMrO3YkxurqDG6sJuUzOq42Tq3U0kCc4dItJ-_9d_3M36R2RVr1LOO0OzEeTkoZGtkbt5l-CB5ObssyFw6HtVQpmyhgcKh709DDje1w6oixXHXwZa-qcPrFxIMY0fMDhafs6TMoh6zcHOvinV0oLn-jyxhFCxy7_CHSjiE_dLlylcVCTytq4zl1FyH3yhJed5-gYlfOvvjLoZZ8JglWDWW--waTz04PjYK74h5pcQ4aER86edrOwMZxU19z5NfPXTyaupnf-htcPpgtHI1mSMMDmyJJYNs2LqrRBgYv-_mZ9rdwaUZXbaw%3D)_

Like the frenzy for tearing down statues that we witnessed in cities not long ago, the Nike shoe controversy is the bitter fruit of the progressive educational agenda.

I hope I can count on you to help us confront this destructive ideology with the truth about American history.

Please share your thoughts with us today!

Bill Gray ’01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The “Flutie Effect”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Doug Flutie is a good friend of mine and a sports legend. He recorded a brief video for you, and I’ll hope you take a moment to watch it! >>> |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fe9cd384e7c74cdda6e45ded7c3a8c88&_e=qLZiY07jJfSqBOqloq3W8z73zfBgMmCIzfToc6IvuDKjKOTnse6VqTklJcm1QpNK9PPWxn2XszjPvywVaCaGUlliMtfq3XZcQBZtdUSLjkuaHrpI65HAKi0oIDMi2b04lAt8LRAbY7UMZwqv7IphqcAPDhfb2XZne7k6lDms16tl3ii-z9I4clmxuE9MSRfjolNuXTeg-VxjZjaC9XbmS7yqEda-8__nKhQLhzJQJ1TLAJWIwhtdx9tstranTxYn90fBk-xXj-g1YAxc_MXGLrOLpnaoYUwhDHJuAPQlNgRCEEcZrbYfTxKTbukmROQsnM0Rfjh8fVLU_HRs7bn7AxK0vNXH9sgrQ4E0sQgghv4yx01GVmlEeaA96J4ZkelHzqX88Y_FV6M3L_EVhmWfAiWUjymt7IcgwHGsBFT2zpSULh9eN-2EOHYdsIIHnSWFBA6o4hxv14tCfWl9HJuy7OI2Tk7gGlH0Rw-l_l-TJlfhQe8gHyBG7OF-UL-UNmvB)

---
Peter,

Doug Flutie is a guy who needs no introduction.

He is remembered for his "Hail Mary" pass at Boston College, winning the Heisman Trophy in 1984, and playing professional football for over 21 years. But to me, Doug Flutie will always be remembered as a good guy and GREAT friend.

clean_body: Doug Flutie is a good friend of mine and a sports legend. He recorded a brief video for you, and I’ll hope you take a moment to watch it! >>> | Peter, Doug Flutie is a guy who needs no introduction. He is remembered for his "Hail Mary" pass at Boston College, winning the Heisman Trophy in 1984, and playing professional football for over 21 years. But to me, Doug Flutie will always be remembered as a good guy and GREAT friend. Doug has endorsed my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Georgia because he knows I won't stop until WE WIN. We cannot lose this race, Peter, because too much is a stake. Raphael Warnock and Senate Democrats are CRIPPLING this country, and we've got to get America back on the right track. I won't stop fighting until we win, but Doug and I need you to hear from YOU to pick up the pace. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: January 6th Survey
subject: Do you even care?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
|
Peter,

**WE’VE GOT ONE QUESTION FOR YOU: ARE YOU WATCHING THE JANUARY 6TH COMMITTEE HEARINGS?**

**Democrats seem to think that they can use Mr. Trump as a “boogeyman” once again – as they did in 2018 and 2020..**

**Are the public hearings going to have an impact on the way you vote in November’s midterms? If yes, we’d like to know, why. If no, we’d like to know, why?**

**This poll will expire at midnight tonight. We are asking for your participation for research purposes and kindly request a response by that time.**

**Survey Request for:**
**_Response Requested By: Midnight Tonight Polls are open until 7/3/2022 at 11:59p.m._**
[ _ « START SURVEY NOW » _
](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5dc3a080ae3a4eadbd1a0023e5e8e4a5&_e=kIYU2EQOYjRzfaSXD1427Sdu__qsfbNbqufZiQKngWo1JxNmKXv2S9KcYEg6QlCeuu-JF00ZUo39OpCVGCgusEFjxbvIZUV5evySOSSKTdkQxacdsyLWd8yKTA9WfyNtoueN_LAzZcRTQwloWm6YeWKptc-4WKzDBGbtISnfB1qRzBb07qFrHa7tSCwCe3el6EwsQTaUg9HORtcl5_9jjn-XwcNE8MFV9F4ZFXF-F3O2qrmgA4xGCiOYqwqces6WO72B0R6mfKmc2gM4SZSOzOPioHKjNQ0CYbeY6t_ieVb-c5u0HhyEE1ZhXgLm84au_Fa3WU9cS7bzVCB-0kY8uqBKnq8PEDl0bwZ7kVm1IXQ-pAfAsq5t9fx4Nhntq32wG_a-DCK10XDweDI5eJbYI5QgqxNtuFmvNzJEmo8xMvPwD1xZScXYvMM1ofGin5M4mXDjg6PeGc3Aon8rxV9l-6sG0f6NR2Spd8TP6qlASeVnxqSSVYuhm_7JbJknMm9UdEx2v6rfeaQ1zjs-XMoQCQ%3D%3D)

Democrats are using the public hearings to galvanize their supporters – and it seems to be working. **All you have to do is look to the $96 MILLION Democrats raised in the month of May.**

We certainly can’t judge whether or not this trial is about raising money and holding onto their tenuous Congressional majorities. But don’t you see a correlation?
We need to hear from you today.

Thanks,
Team NRSC HQ
